question: Which genes have label that starts with 'MIR43'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR43' RETURN g.Label AS Gene

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs start with 'hsa-miR-2' and have sequences exactly 23 nucleotides long?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 23 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which GO terms have a label containing 'cell cycle g1' (case-insensitive)?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE toLower(g.Label) CONTAINS 'cell cycle g1' RETURN g.Label AS GOterm

question: Which phenotypes include 'inflammation' in their label and have at least one synonym with no ASCII letters (A–Z, a-z)?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'inflammation' AND ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE NOT syn =~ '.*[A-Za-z].*') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which diseases have a description that contains the word 'brain' and a label that contains 'virus'? Return the entire nodes (i.e., all their properties).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'brain' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'virus' RETURN d

question: Which molecular functions have labels containing 'kinase activator'?
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'kinase activator' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Which human miRNAs starting with 'hsa-let-' have sequence lengths between 18 and 25 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-let-' AND SIZE(m.Sequence)>= 18 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) <= 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which miRNAs have the genomic coordinates mapped to chromosome X and sequences ending with 'GA'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GA' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which genes with labels starting with 'MIR' that have genomic coordinates on chromosomes 1 or 2 have at least 5 synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) >= 5 AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord =~ '^chr(1|2)(:.*)?$') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Synonym AS Synonyms, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which GO terms have label mentioning 'membrane' and description mentioning 'transport', and have at least one synonym?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'membrane' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'transport' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) >= 1 RETURN g.Label AS GOTermLabel, g.Description AS GOTermDescription, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynonymCount

question: Which diseases contain 'thyroid' in their label and mention 'carcinoma' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'thyroid' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'carcinoma' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Find cellular components whose description includes 'membrane vesicle'. Return only their labels.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Description CONTAINS 'membrane vesicle' RETURN cc.Label

question: Identify diseases containing 'myocardial infarct' in their label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'myocardial infarct' RETURN d.Label

question: Return Homo sapiens miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-1' and sequences end with 'GACU'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-1' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GACU' RETURN m.Label, m.Sequence

question: Return GO terms whose labels contain 'kinase inhibitor' and do not contain 'protein'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'kinase inhibitor' AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS 'protein' RETURN g.Label

question: Which genes contain 'MIR1' (case-insensitive) in their label and have at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome 7?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE toLower(g.Label) CONTAINS 'mir1' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr7') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which GO terms have synonyms mentioning 'transport'? Return their labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'transport') RETURN g.Label AS GO, g.ID AS GO_ID

question: Which phenotypes have labels containing 'skeletal' (case-insensitive) and exactly 4 synonyms recorded?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE toLower(p.Label) CONTAINS 'skeletal' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) = 4 RETURN p.Label AS PhenotypeLabel, p.Synonym AS PhenotypeSynonym

question: List cellular components whose labels end with 'membrane' and whose descriptions mention mitochondria.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label ENDS WITH 'membrane' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'mitochondria' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Which human miRNAs start with 'hsa-miR-2' and have a sequence length of exactly 24 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species:'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 24 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: List Homo sapiens precursor miRNAs whose label mentions '19b precursor'. Return only miRNAs' label and their IDs.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE p.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND p.Label CONTAINS '19b precursor' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.ID AS ID

question: Which diseases mention 'tachycardia' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'tachycardia' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which cellular components have 'nucleus' in their label and mention 'membrane' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'membrane' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Which human miRNAs have labels ending with 'b-3p' and sequences starting with 'A'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH 'b-3p' AND m.Sequence STARTS WITH 'A' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which genes have labels starting with 'MIR4' and genomic coordinates starting with 'chr7:'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR4' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr7:') RETURN  g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which infectious diseases have labels containing 'limbic encephalitis'?
cypher: MATCH (id:Infectious_disease) WHERE id.Label CONTAINS 'limbic encephalitis' RETURN id.Label AS InfectiousDisease

question: List Homo sapiens miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-19' whose sequence ends with 'A' and have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 (using 'chr1:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-19' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'A' AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Return GO terms whose Description mentions 'mitochondrial fission'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'mitochondrial fission' RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, g.Description AS Description

question: Which phenotypes with 'bone' in the label have no recorded synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'bone' AND (p.Synonym IS NULL OR SIZE(p.Synonym) = 0) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: List Homo sapiens miRNAs whose labels end with '3p' and have sequences at least 25 nucleotides long.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label ENDS WITH '3p' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which genes have at least 20 synonym at least one of them containing the substring 'kinase'? Return genes' label and synonyms.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(g.Synonym) >= 20 AND ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'kinase') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Find GO terms whose descriptions mention 'transmembrane' and that have at least one synonym.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'transmembrane' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) > 0 RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, g.Description AS Description, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which diseases with labels containing 'cardiomyopathy' have descriptions that include 'myocardium'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'cardiomyopathy' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'myocardium' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which human miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-' followed by a number from 1 to 3, have sequences exactly 25 nucleotides long?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label =~ '^hsa-miR-[1-3].*' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which human genes with labels starting with 'MIR3' have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 (using 'chr1:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates)?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR3' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which phenotypes whose labels contain 'tumor' have at least 8 synonyms recorded?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'tumor' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 8 RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which human miRNAs are located on chromosome X (use the property 'Genomic_coordinates' and check if at least one item start with 'chrX') and have sequences ending with 'CU'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'CU' RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which diseases have labels containing 'dysplasia' and descriptions mentioning 'lethal skeletal'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'dysplasia' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'lethal skeletal' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Find GO terms contain 'apoptosis' in their label.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'apoptosis' RETURN g.Label AS GOterm

question: List human genes whose labels start with 'MIR' and have sequences longer than 200 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR' AND SIZE(g.Sequence) > 200 RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Which diseases mention 'cerebellar vermis' in their descriptions?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'cerebellar vermis' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: List human miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-' whose sequence length is between 26 and 30 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species:'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 26 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) <= 30 RETURN  m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Identify the molecular functions whose labels spotlight 'kinase binding' but do not contain 'serine/threonine'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'kinase binding' AND NOT mf.Label CONTAINS 'serine/threonine' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Find cellular components that mention 'nucleus' in the label.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-2' and ending with 'a-3p' have sequences between 20 and 24 nucleotides long and contain 'AAA' or 'UUU'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' AND m.Label ENDS WITH 'a-3p' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 20 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) <= 24 AND (m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAA' OR m.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUU') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Retrieve human genes with labels starting with 'MIR2' that have genomic coordinates exclusively on chromosome 9.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR2' AND ALL(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr9') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which diseases have descriptions mentioning both 'brain' and 'tumor' but their label does not contain 'brain' (case-insensitive)?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'brain' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'tumor' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'brain' RETURN  d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: List all human miRNAs whose label starts with 'hsa-miR-13' and whose sequence ends with an 'A'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-13' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'A' RETURN m.Label AS miRNALabel, m.Sequence AS miRNASequence

question: Find the molecular functions that hint 'stress stimuli' in their description. Return all nodes' property (i.e., the entire nodes).
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'stress stimuli' RETURN mf AS MolecularFunction

question: Which human genes starting with 'MIR8' have genomic coordinates exclusively on chromosome 2?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR8' AND ALL(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr2') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates

question: Which GO terms mention 'degranulation' in their label?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'degranulation' RETURN g.Label

question: List diseases with 'connective tissue' mentioned in their label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'connective tissue' RETURN d.Label

question: Find the molecular functions whose descriptions mention 'acetylation'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'acetylation' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: Find cellular components with labels containing 'mitochondrial derivative'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondrial derivative' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List human miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-', have sequences exactly 26 nucleotides long, and contain 'GGGG' or 'CCCC'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 26 AND (m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGGG' OR m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCC') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Return genes whose labels start with 'MIR31' and have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 or 2 (using 'chr1:' and 'chr2:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR31' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:' OR coord STARTS WITH 'chr2:') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find GO terms whose labels mention 'transport of viral material t' and descriptions mention 'membrane'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'transport of viral material t' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'membrane' RETURN g.Label AS GO, g.Description AS Description

question: Identify cellular components with labels containing 'mitochondr' and descriptions mentioning 'matrix'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondr' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'matrix' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List phenotypes whose labels contain 'myopathy' and that have at least one synonym containing 'minicore'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'myopathy' AND ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'minicore') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which human miRNA have sequence exactly 28 nucleotides long? Return only the miRNAs' label, sequence, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 28 RETURN m.Label, m.Sequence, m.URI

question: What is the average sequence length of human miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-2'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS AvgLength

question: What is the average sequence length of human miRNAs whose sequence ends with an 'A'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'A' RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS AvgLength

question: List GO terms whose labels contain 'synapse-associated' and whose IDs start with 'GO:01'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'synapse-associated' AND g.ID STARTS WITH 'GO:01' RETURN g.Label AS GO, g.ID AS ID

question: Identify phenotypes whose label contains 'cerebellar' and that have at least 10 synonyms.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'cerebellar' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 10 RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which phenotypes have 'cyst' in their label, have at least 10 synonyms, and include at least one synonym that contains non-ASCII letters (A-Z, a-z)?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'cyst' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 10 AND ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s =~ '.*[^a-zA-Z].*') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: List human genes whose labels begin with 'MIR7' and whose sequences exceed 120 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR7' AND SIZE(g.Sequence) > 120 RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which phenotypes contain the word 'amputation’ in their label and have synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'amputation' AND p.Synonym IS NOT NULL RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which diseases mention 'dysmorphisms' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'dysmorphisms' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: List the label and the ID of all GO terms whose label contain 'apoptosis'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'apoptosis' RETURN g.Label, g.ID

question: Which molecular functions have descriptions matching a pattern that includes 'binding to mrna'?
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'binding to a mrna' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, mf.Description AS Description

question: Which miRNAs have sequence length exactly 20 nucleotides and their sequences contains 'GGG' and 'AAA'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGG' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAA' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 20 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: How many miRNAs have sequence length greater than 25 nucleotides and do not have 'GGGG' in their sequences?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGGG' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) > 25 RETURN COUNT(m) AS NumberOfmiRNAs

question: How many human miRNAs have sequence free from 'AGGGGA' and sequence length less than 20 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AGGGGA' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) < 20 RETURN COUNT(m) AS NumberOfmiRNAs

question: List precursor miRNAs whose sequences end with 'AU' and whose genomic coordinates include at least one entry starting with 'chr1:'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE p.Sequence ENDS WITH 'AU' AND ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Genomic_coordinates AS Coordinates, p.Sequence As Sequence

question: Find diseases mentioning 'arrhythmogenic' in their description. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'arrhythmogenic' RETURN d.Label, d.ID

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs have sequences of exactly 22 nucleotides and labels starting with 'hsa-miR-19' and do not end with 'p'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 22 AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-19' AND NOT m.Label ENDS WITH 'p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: Return diseases whose descriptions mention 'cardiac' and whose names contain 'ring'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'cardiac' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'ring' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify phenotypes with labels ending in 'deficiency' that have at least one synonym. Return phenotypes' label and their synonym count.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label ENDS WITH 'deficiency' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 1 RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, SIZE(p.Synonym) AS SynonymCount

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs are at least 150 nucleotide-sequence long?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 150 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Return all properties of the diseases containing 'cardiomyopathy 1A' in their label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'cardiomyopathy 1A' RETURN d

question: List GO terms whose descriptions mention 'outer mitochondrial membrane'. Return only the node labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'outer mitochondrial membrane' RETURN g.Label AS GO

question: Which cellular components contain 'nucleus' in their label?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which GO terms have descriptions containing 'adaptive immune response'?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'adaptive immune response' RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm

question: Which cellular components with 'cell' in the label have at least one synonym?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'cell' AND SIZE(cc.Synonym) >= 1 RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: How many human miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR' have exactly 22-nt sequences?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 22 RETURN COUNT(m) AS NumberOfmiRNAs

question: Return GO terms whose label contains 'protein' and that have at least one recorded synonym.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'protein' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) > 0 RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynonymCount

question: Retrieve the top 2 genes with the highest number of synonyms. In case of ties, order genes alphabetically by gene label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Synonym IS NOT NULL RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynonymCount ORDER BY SynonymCount DESC, Gene ASC LIMIT 2

question: What is the average number of synonyms per gene?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) RETURN AVG(SIZE(g.Synonym)) AS AverageSynonymCount

question: Find the maximum number of characters in a gene label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NOT NULL RETURN MAX(SIZE(g.Label)) AS MaxGeneLength

question: Find the maximum number of characters in a gene label for genes whose labels are a single word.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NOT NULL AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS ' ' RETURN MAX(SIZE(g.Label)) AS MaxGeneLength

question: Return all genes with single-word labels that are exactly 22 characters long.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NOT NULL AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS ' ' AND SIZE(g.Label) = 22 RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Label) AS NameLength

question: Find genes whose labels contain exactly two hyphens ('-').
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(SPLIT(g.Label, '-')) - 1 = 2 RETURN g.Label AS Gene

question: Find genes whose labels start with a single capital letter followed by the word 'gene'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '^[A-Z] gene.*' RETURN g.Label AS Gene

question: Find genes whose labels contain 'coronavirus'. Return their labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'coronavirus' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.ID AS ID

question: What is the average number of characters in gene labels?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) RETURN AVG(SIZE(g.Label)) AS AverageGeneNameLength

question: Which miRNAs have sequences less than 17 nucleotides long and contain at least one 'A'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) < 17 AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'A' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which miRNAs have sequences less than 17 nucleotides long and contain at least one 'A', 'U', 'C', and 'G'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) < 17 AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'A' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'U' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'C' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'G' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose descriptions mention both 'tachycardia' and 'gene'.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.Description CONTAINS 'tachycardia' AND cd.Description CONTAINS 'gene' RETURN cd.Label AS Cardiovascular_disease, cd.Description AS Description

question: Which GO terms contain 'cell' in the label and have at least one synonym?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'cell' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) > 0 RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynonymCount

question: Find genes whose label starts with 'MIR9' and that have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 (chr1:) or X.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR9' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:' OR coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: How many genes have label ending with a letter and at least one genomic coordinate starting with 'chrX'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*[A-Za-z]$' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN COUNT(g) AS NumberOfGenes

question: How many genes have label ending with a number and all genomic coordinate starting with 'chrX'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*\d$' AND ALL(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN COUNT(g) AS NumberOfGenes

question: Return diseases whose labels contain 'thyroid' and descriptions mention 'autoimmune'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'thyroid' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'autoimmune' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Find miRNAs ending with 'f-3p'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH 'f-3p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which GO terms have labels that include 'nsulin-like'?
cypher: MATCH (go:GO) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'nsulin-like' RETURN go.Label AS GOterm

question: Return phenotypes whose labels contain 'tissue neoplasm'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'tissue neoplasm' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Retrieve human miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-' followed by a number from 1 to 5, end with '5p', and have sequences exactly 25 nucleotides long.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label =~ '^hsa-miR-[1-5].*5p$' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: List precursor miRNAs on chromosome X whose sequences end with 'CAA'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX:') AND p.Sequence ENDS WITH 'CAA' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, p.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which genes list 'KLF4' (case-insensitive) among their synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE toLower(s) CONTAINS 'klf4') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Find GO terms that have a synonym containing 'immunoglobulin'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'immunoglobulin') RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: List human miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-2' and whose sequence length is between 18 and 21 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 18 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) <= 21 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: List all genes whose labels start with 'MIR31' and that have at least one synonym containing 'microRNA 3171' (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR31' AND ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE toLower(s) CONTAINS 'microrna 3171') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Identify precursor miRNAs whose sequence ends with 'AU' and whose genomic coordinates include an entry starting with 'chr12'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE p.Sequence ENDS WITH 'AU' AND ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr12') RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Genomic_coordinates AS Coordinates

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs ending with '7e-5p' have a sequence length of exactly 22 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label ENDS WITH '7e-5p' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 22 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: List precursor miRNAs whose description mentions the letter 'b' and whose sequence is at least 100 nucleotides long.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE p.Description CONTAINS 'b' AND SIZE(p.Sequence) >= 100 RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Description, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: Find human genes with labels starting with 'MIR' that have at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome Y.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find human genes with labels starting with 'MIR' followed by a number from 1 to 5 that have at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome 22.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label =~ '^MIR[1-5].*' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr22') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find Homo sapiens miRNAs with labels ending with '-5p' preceded by a lowercase letter that have sequences at least 25 nucleotides long.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label =~ '.*[a-z]-5p$' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which phenotypes whose description contains 'hypoplasia' have at least one synonym containing 'facial'?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Description CONTAINS 'hypoplasia' AND ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'facial') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: List genes with labels beginning with 'MIR' that have genomic coordinates on chromosome 13 or 23.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord =~ '^chr(13|23).*') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-20' followed by a number from 1 to 9 have exactly 22-nucleotide sequences?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label =~ '^hsa-miR-20[1-9].*' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 22 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Return GO terms whose descriptions mention both 'proton' and 'catalytic'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'proton' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'catalytic' RETURN g.Label AS GO, g.Description AS Description

question: Which genes have genomic coordinates on chromosome 17 and sequences longer than 200,000 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr17') AND SIZE(g.Sequence) > 200000 RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Which human miRNAs starting with 'hsa' have sequences higher than 27 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) > 27 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which cellular components mention 'zona pellucida' in their labels?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'zona pellucida' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List human miRNAs with genomic coordinate exclusively on chromosome 1 (chr1:) whose sequence ends with 'UA'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species:'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE ALL(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'UA' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Return GO terms whose descriptions contain 'decarboxylation'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'decarboxylation' RETURN g.Label, g.Description

question: Find Homo sapiens miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-1' whose sequences end with 'AAA'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-1' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'AAA' RETURN m.Label

question: List diseases with labels containing 'cardiomyopathy' and descriptions mentioning 'familial'
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'cardiomyopathy' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'familial' RETURN d.Label, d.Description

question: Find phenotypes with a synonym containing 'extraocular'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'extraocular') RETURN p.Label, p.Synonym

question: Which miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-200' have sequences exactly 22 nucleotides long?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-200' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 22 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: List diseases containing 'thyroid' in the label and whose descriptions include 'adenocarcinoma'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'thyroid' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'adenocarcinoma' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: How many GO terms have labels containing the word 'transport'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE toLower(g.Label) CONTAINS 'transport' RETURN COUNT(g) AS NumberOfGOTerms

question: Which precursor miRNAs have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 (chr1:) and sequences longer than 100 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') AND SIZE(p.Sequence) > 100 RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Genomic_coordinates AS Coordinates, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which cellular components have label containing mitochondria and mention 'membrane' in their descriptions?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondria' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'membrane' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve diseases whose descriptions mention 'metabolic complications' but whose labels do not include 'syndrome'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'metabolic complications' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'syndrome' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: Which GO terms contain 'membrane' in their label and list at least one synonym mentioning 'plasma'?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'membrane' AND ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'plasma') RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which precursor miRNAs have sequences shorter than 50 nucleotides and labels ending with 'precursor'?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(p.Sequence) < 50 AND p.Label ENDS WITH 'precursor' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: List precursor miRNAs whose description contain 'precursor' and have sequences shorter than 50 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE p.Description CONTAINS 'precursor' AND SIZE(p.Sequence) < 50 RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: Return genes whose label startd with 'MIR4' and whose genomic coordinates include positions on chromosome 7.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR4' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr7') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Identify cellular components whose label includes mitochondria whose descriptions include 'outer membrane'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondria' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'outer membrane' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: List human genes starting with 'MIR425' whose genomic coordinates lie on chromosome 1 or 2 (i.e., 'chr1:' or 'chr2:').
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR425' AND any(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:' OR coord STARTS WITH 'chr2:') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Retrieve all diseases whose descriptions include both the terms 'neurodevelopment' and 'rare'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'neurodevelopment' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'rare' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description

question: List cellular components whose labels contain 'chromosome' and whose descriptions contain 'gene' and either 'dna' or 'rna'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'chromosome' AND (cc.Description CONTAINS 'rna' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'dna') AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'gene' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Find phenotypes that have at least one synonym containing 'hemifacial' while also not containing 'tessier'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'hemifacial' AND NOT syn CONTAINS 'tessier') RETURN p.Label

question: Which miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-181' have sequence length 20-23 nt.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-181' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 20 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) <= 23 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which diseases have descriptions that mention 'Paracoccidioides brasiliensis'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'paracoccidioides brasiliensis' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which diseases mention 'abuse' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'abuse' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve molecular functions whose descriptions contain 'ransmembrane transporter'. Return all node properties (i.e., the entire nodes)
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'ransmembrane transporter' RETURN mf

question: Return cellular components with descriptions referring to 'giardia species'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cellular_component) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'giardia species' RETURN c.Label AS CellularComponent, c.Description AS Description

question: List molecular function containing 'histone H1' in the label.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'histone H1' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Find all human miRNAs ending with '55-5p'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label ENDS WITH '55-5p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: List GO terms relevant to adults.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'adult' OR g.Description CONTAINS 'adult' RETURN g.Label AS GO

question: Find genes that have labels beginning with the word 'METT'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'METT' RETURN g.Label AS Gene

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs have sequences of at least 23 nucleotides, labels ending with '3p', and at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome X?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 23 AND m.Label ENDS WITH '3p' AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which genes with labels starting with 'MIR4' have a synonym containing 'microRNA' (case-insensitive) and genomic coordinates on chromosome 7?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR4' AND ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE toLower(s) CONTAINS 'microrna') AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr7') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Synonym AS Synonyms, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which diseases mention 'disability syndrome' in the label and 'recessive' in the description? Return only the gene label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'disability syndrome' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'recessive' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.ID AS ID

question: List genes whose labels start with 'MIR50' and that have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 or 2 (using 'chr1:' or 'chr2:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR50' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:' OR coord STARTS WITH 'chr2:') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: How many GO terms with description containing 'cell cycle' have at least three synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'cell cycle' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) >= 3 RETURN COUNT(g.Label) AS HowManyGOterms

question: Which molecular functions described with 'kinase' and have labels ending with 'inhibitor activity'?
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'kinase' AND mf.Label ENDS WITH 'inhibitor activity' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, mf.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve neurodegenerative diseases whose label mentions 'Alzheimer' (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE toLower(n.Label) CONTAINS 'alzheimer' RETURN n.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease

question: Return GO terms whose labels mention 'axon guidance' and descriptions mention 'signaling'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'axon guidance' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'signaling' RETURN g.Label AS GO

question: Find diseases whose label contains 'thyroid' and description mentioning 'autoimmune'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'thyroid' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'autoimmune' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: Return phenotypes with labels mentioning 'neoplasm' (case-insensitive) that have at least one synonym containing 'tumor'(case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE toLower(p.Label) CONTAINS 'neoplasm' AND ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE toLower(syn) CONTAINS 'tumor') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Return GO terms containing 'apoptosis' in their label and 'caspase' in their description.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'apoptosis' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'caspase' RETURN g.Label AS GOterm, g.Description AS Description

question: Find phenotypes that have a synonym mentioning 'aortic'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'aortic') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Find the molecular functions whose description contains 'e3 proteins'. Return all the node properties (i.e., the entire nodes).
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'e3 proteins' RETURN mf

question: Retrieve cellular components whose label contains 'mitochondr' and description mentions 'matrix'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondr' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'matrix' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Find GO terms whose label contains 'cell cycle' and whose description mentions 'checkpoint'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'cell cycle' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'checkpoint' RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, g.Description AS Description

question: Find molecular functions with 'amylase' in their label
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'amylase' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Which Homo sapiens genes are on chromosome 7 and have at least one synonym containing 'kinase'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr7') AND ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'kinase') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates

question: Find all the diseases whose labels contain 'valgus syndrome'. Return all the node properties (i.e., the entire nodes).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'valgus syndrome' RETURN d

question: Find cellular components label containing 't=' (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE toLower(cc.Label) CONTAINS 't=' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List the labels of all molecular functions with descriptions containing 'phosphatase'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'phosphatase' RETURN mf.Label

question: Return label, description and ID of diseases containing the word 'dependence' in their label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'dependence' RETURN d.Label, d.Description, d.ID

question: List the synonyms of phenotypes having at least one synonym containing the Czech word 'ortálního'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'ortálního') RETURN p.Label, p.Synonym

question: Find all diseases whose label contains 'hypertrophic cardiomyopathy' that are not cardiovascular diseases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'hypertrophic cardiomyopathy' AND NOT d:Cardiovascular_disease RETURN d.Label

question: Which cellular components mention 'dendritic tree' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Description CONTAINS 'dendritic tree' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Which biological processes have labels mentioning 'cell cycle' and descriptions mentioning 'regulation'?
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'cell cycle' AND bp.Description CONTAINS 'regulation' RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, bp.Description AS Description

question: Find GO terms with label containing 'membrane' that have a synonym mentioning 'plasma membrane'. Return all the properties (i.e., the entire nodes).
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'membrane' AND ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'plasma membrane') RETURN g

question: Identify diseases characterized by labels containing 'disability' and whose clinical descriptions contain 'deafness'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'disability' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'deafness' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which diseases have labels containing 'neonatal' and 'disability' and descriptions that do not mention 'deafness'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'disability' AND NOT d.Description CONTAINS 'deafness' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'neonatal' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which infectious diseases have labels containing 'herpetic' and descriptions containing 'painful'? Return all their properties (i.e., the entire nodes).
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'herpetic' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'painful' RETURN d

question: Which infectious diseases have descriptions that mention 'consciousness'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'consciousness' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which infectious diseases have 'cytomegalovirus' in their descriptions?
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'cytomegalovirus' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the description for disease(s) labeled as 'viral eye infection'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease {Label: 'viral eye infection'}) RETURN d.Description

question: Which infectious diseases have descriptions that mention 'several viruses'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'several viruses' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which neurodegenerative diseases have descriptions that mention 'dementia'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'dementia' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: List 'invasive' infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'invasive' RETURN d.Label

question: List infectious diseases whose 'Label' contain 'chronic'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'chronic' RETURN d.Label

question: List 'chronic' autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'chronic' RETURN d.Label

question: List autoimmune diseases whose label contain 'sclerosis'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' RETURN d.Label

question: Which genes have labels that start with 'TP' and are exactly 4 characters long?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'TP' AND SIZE(g.Label) = 4 RETURN g.Label

question: Which genes have labels that start with the letter 'P' and include a hyphen ('-')?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'P' AND g.Label CONTAINS '-' RETURN  g.Label

question: Which phenotypes have labels shorter than 5 characters?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE SIZE(p.Label) < 5 RETURN p

question: How many genes have labels ending with a consonant?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*[^AEIOU]$' RETURN COUNT(g) AS HowManyGenes

question: Which phenotypes have labels that end with 'deficiency'?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label ENDS WITH 'deficiency' RETURN p.Label

question: Return diseases whose labels contain 'allergic'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'allergic' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: Find diseases whose descriptions include both 'autoimmune' and 'inflammation', excluding those with 'cancer' in the label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'autoimmune' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'inflammation' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'cancer' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: List all precursor miRNAs that are longer than 120 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(p.Sequence) > 120 RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: Return diseases whose descriptions mention 'tachycardia' and labels include 'syndrome'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'tachycardia' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'syndrome' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which GO terms 'Label' contain both 'synapse' and 'assembly'?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'synapse' AND g.Label CONTAINS 'assembly' RETURN g.Label AS GO

question: Which genes have genomic coordinates starting with 'chr9' and whose names end with two letters?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE toString(coord) STARTS WITH 'chr9') AND g.Label=~ '.*[A-Za-z]{2}$' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS Coordinates

question: List precursor miRNAs whose genomic coordinates include chromosome X entries (starting with 'chrX') and whose sequences end with 'AU'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE toString(coord) STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND p.Sequence ENDS WITH 'AU' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: How many genes have at least one genomic coordinate that starts with 'chrX'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE toString(coord) STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS NumberOfGenes

question: Which autoimmune diseases mentioning 'diabetes' have a non-empty description?
cypher: MATCH (a:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(a.Label) CONTAINS 'diabetes' AND SIZE(a.Description) > 0 RETURN a.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease, a.Description AS Description

question: Return genes have labels starting with 'MIR43' and have genomic coordinates starting with 'chr17'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR43' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr17') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which molecular functions mention 'kinase' in their description and have IDs starting with 'GO:003'? Return only their labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE toLower(mf.Description) CONTAINS 'kinase' AND mf.ID STARTS WITH 'GO:003' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, mf.ID AS ID

question: Which cellular components contain 'rna' in their label and 'dna' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'rna' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'dna' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Which diseases mention 'breast' in their label and 'uncommon neoplasms' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'breast' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'uncommon neoplasms' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Find cellular components with 'nucleus' in their label and whose description does not include 'membrane'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' AND NOT cc.Description CONTAINS 'membrane' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Find diseases with labels containing 'breast' and description containing 'uncommon'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'breast' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'uncommon' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: How many GO terms have 'synaptic' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'synaptic' RETURN COUNT(g.Label) AS HowManyGOterms

question: Which infectious diseases have 'fever' in their description and 'virus' in the label (case-insensitive)?
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'fever' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'virus' RETURN d.Label AS InfectiousDisease, d.Description AS Description

question: List pre-miRNAs with sequences longer than 100 nucleotides whose labels do not end with 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(p.Sequence) > 100 AND NOT p.Label ENDS WITH 'precursor' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: List diseases that have label containing 'adult brain'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'adult brain' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: How many different diseases have labels that contain 'intellectual disability'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'intellectual disability' RETURN COUNT(d.Label) AS HowManyDiseases

question: Find miRNAs that have long sequences (more than 160 nucleotides). Return their full labels and descriptions.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) > 160 RETURN SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Description AS Description

question: Find miRNAs that have short sequences (less than 17 nucleotides). Return their labels, descriptions, and their sequence and sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) < 17 RETURN m.Sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the 5 miRNAs with the longest sequences. Return their labels, descriptions, and sequence length. In case of ties, order miRNAs alphabetically by label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Description AS Description, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length ORDER BY Length DESC, miRNA ASC LIMIT 5

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences do not contain 'A' but do contain the motif 'CCCC' and return their labels and sequences.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'A' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCC' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences do not contain the nucleotides 'C' or 'A'. Return all their properties (i.e., the entire nodes).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'C' AND NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'A' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain the motif 'GGGGGGGG' (8 consecutive Gs). Return their labels and sequences.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGGGGGGG' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain a motif of 7 consecutive Cs. Return their labels and sequence lengths.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCCCCC' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain a motif of 18 consecutive Us. Return their labels and sequence lengths.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain a motif of 13 consecutive As. Return their labels and sequences length.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAAAAAAAAAAAA' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences do not contain 'G' and contain at least one motif of four identical consecutive nucleotides (A, C or U). Return their labels and sequences.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'G' AND (m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAAA' OR m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCC' OR m.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUUU') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which miRNAs located on chromosome X have sequences ending with 'GA'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GA' RETURN  m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find the average sequence length of miRNAs whose genomic coordinate are located on the chromosome X.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: Count miRNAs whose genomic coordinates are located on chromosome 1 (using 'chr1:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: List all miRNAs whose genomic coordinates are located on chromosome Y.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find miRNAs characterized by more than six genomic coordinates. Return their labels and all genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Genomic_coordinates) > 6 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find the maximum number of genomic coordinates on which any miRNA can be located.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) RETURN MAX(SIZE(m.Genomic_coordinates)) AS MaxChromosomeCount

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences start with 'A', end with 'U', have sequence length greater than 50, and are mapped to chromosome 1 or 2 ('chr1:' and 'chr2:'). Return their labels, sequences, and genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence STARTS WITH 'A' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'U' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) > 100 AND (ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') OR ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr2:')) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find miRNAs that have more than 2 genomic coordinates on chromosome X. Return their labels and all genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE([coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX']) > 2 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Count pre-miRNAs whose labels contain 'stem-loop'.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS 'stem-loop' RETURN COUNT(pm) AS PreMiRNACount

question: Count pre-miRNAs whose labels do not contain the word 'precursor'. Return their labels.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE NOT pm.Label CONTAINS 'precursor' RETURN COUNT(pm) AS PreMiRNACount

question: Count pre-miRNAs whose labels do not contain the word 'precursor' and do not contain 'stem'. Return their labels and IDs .
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE NOT pm.Label CONTAINS 'precursor' AND NOT pm.Label CONTAINS 'stem' RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, pm.ID AS ID

question: Retrieve 5 pre-miRNA from the longest sequence. In case of ties, sort alphabetically by label. Return their full labels, descriptions, and sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) RETURN pm.Label AS pre_miRNA, pm.Description AS Description, SIZE(pm.Sequence) AS Length ORDER BY Length DESC, pre_miRNA ASC LIMIT 5

question: Find the genomic coordinates of pre-miRNAs whose sequence length is exactly 180 nucleotides. Return their labels and genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(pm.Sequence) = 180 RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, pm.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find the average sequence length of pre-miRNAs whose sequences are between 150 and 180 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(pm.Sequence) >= 150 AND SIZE(pm.Sequence) <= 180 RETURN AVG(SIZE(pm.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: Find the maximum sequence length of pre-miRNAs with at least one genomic coordinate located on chromosome X.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN pm.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN MAX(SIZE(pm.Sequence)) AS MaxSequenceLength

question: Find the minimum sequence length of pre-miRNAs that are located on chromosome Y.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN pm.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN MIN(SIZE(pm.Sequence)) AS MaxSequenceLength

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain a motif of 19 consecutive Us. Return their label, sequences length, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU' RETURN pm.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(pm.Sequence) AS SequenceLength, pm.URI

question: Find all pre-miRNAs whose labels contain '196'. Return their labels and descriptions.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS '196' RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA_Label, pm.Description AS Pre_miRNA_Description

question: Find all pre-miRNAs whose labels contain '%'. Return their label, description and sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS '%' RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA_Label, pm.Description AS Pre_miRNA_Description, SIZE(pm.Sequence)

question: Find  the Genomic coordinates where all pre-miRNAs whose labels contain 'to' are located. Return their label and sequences length.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS 'to' RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA_Label, SIZE(pm.Sequence), pm.Genomic_coordinates

question: Count pre-miRNAs that have labels ending with a letter other than 'a', 'b', or 'c' followed by the word 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label =~ '.*[d-z] precursor$' RETURN COUNT(pm) AS PreMiRNACount

question: Which pre-miRNAs have labels that end with one of the letters 'f', 'j', 'h' followed by the word 'precursor'?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label =~ '.*[fjh] precursor$' RETURN pm.Label

question: Which pre-miRNAs have at least 3 genomic coordinates that start with 'chr21'?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE([coord IN pm.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr21']) >= 3 RETURN pm.Label AS pre_miRNA, pm.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find pre-miRNAs characterized by more than five genomic coordinates. Return their labels and all genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(pm.Genomic_coordinates) > 5 RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, pm.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which pre-miRNAs have labels that start with 'Hsa-Let' and what is the length of their sequence?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label STARTS WITH 'Hsa-Let' RETURN pm.Label, SIZE(pm.Sequence)

question: Which pre-miRNAs have labels that do not start with 'microRNA' or 'Hsa', and what is the length of their sequence?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE NOT pm.Label STARTS WITH 'microRNA' AND NOT pm.Label STARTS WITH 'Hsa' RETURN pm.Label, SIZE(pm.Sequence)

question: Which genes have labels that contain only consonants and are longer than 5 characters?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '^[BC-DF-GHJ-LMNP-QR-STV-Zbc-df-ghj-lmnp-qr-stv-z]+$' AND SIZE(g.Label) > 5 RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: Which genes have labels that are exactly 2 characters long, and what is the length of their sequence?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE size(g.Label) = 2 RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, SIZE(g.Sequence)

question: Which genes have labels that start with a letter followed by one or more numbers?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '^[A-Za-z][0-9]+' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: How many genes have a null or empty label?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NULL OR g.Label = '' RETURN COUNT(g) AS NullGeneCount

question: Which genes are short, i.e., having sequences shorter than 50 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(g.Sequence) < 50 RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: What is the maximum sequence length among all genes?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) RETURN MAX(SIZE(g.Sequence)) AS MaxSequenceLength

question: What is the minimum sequence length among all genes?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) RETURN MIN(SIZE(g.Sequence)) AS MinSequenceLength

question: What is the average sequence length of genes that have sequence lengths between 20,000 and 1,000,000 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(g.Sequence) >= 20000 AND SIZE(g.Sequence) <= 1000000 RETURN AVG(SIZE(g.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: Which genes have labels that start with 'MIR' and end with a number between 4 and 9?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '^MIR.*-[4-9]+$' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: Which genes have genomic coordinates on both chrX and chrY?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: What is the number of genes whose genomic coordinates located on chrY? What is the average length of their sequence?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN COUNT(g) AS GeneCount, AVG(SIZE(g.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: How many genes have sequences that do not contain the letter 'U'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE NOT g.Sequence CONTAINS 'U' RETURN count(g.Label) AS GeneCount

question: Which genes have sequences that contain a stretch of 50 consecutive Ts?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Sequence CONTAINS 'TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: Which genes have sequences containing at least 75 consecutive As? Return only their labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Sequence =~ '.*A{75,}.*' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: List the five genes with the highest number of synonyms. In case of ties, order genes alphabetically.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Synonym IS NOT NULL RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynCount ORDER BY SynCount DESC, GeneLabel ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which genes have a description, and what are their descriptions?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Description IS NOT NULL RETURN g.Label, g.Description

question: Return all properties (i.e., the entire node) of the gene labeled as 'gene of Bacteria'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Label:'gene of Bacteria'}) RETURN g

question: Which genes contain 'coronavirus' in their label but do not have a reported sequence?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'coronavirus' AND g.Sequence IS NULL RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: List all diseases that contain 'covid' in their labels (case-insensitive) but are not classified as infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'covid' AND NOT d:Infectious_disease RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find all diseases whose labels contain 'cancer' (case-insensitive) but are not classified as cancers.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'cancer' AND NOT d:Cancer RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Return all diseases whose labels contain 'animal' but do not contain 'non-human', Return their labels and descriptions.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'animal' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'non-human' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve all properties (i.e., the entire nodes) of diseases whose labels contain 'child' and that are both neurodegenerative and autoimmune.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'child' AND d:Neurodegenerative_disease AND d:Autoimmune_disease RETURN d

question: List all diseases that contain 'basal ganglia' in their label and show how they are classified (use LABELS(Disease). Return diseases' labels and types.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'basal ganglia' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Retrieve diseases that are classified as neurodegenerative diseases, autoimmune diseases, and cancers.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d:Neurodegenerative_disease AND d:Autoimmune_disease AND d:Cancer RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Retrieve diseases whose descriptions contain 'mid-adolescence' and whose labels contain 'epilepsy'. Return their label, ID and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'mid-adolescence' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'epilepsy' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.ID, d.URI

question: Find epilepsy dog diseases, i.e., diseases whose labels contain 'epilepsy' and 'dog'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'epilepsy' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'dog' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find epilepsy diseases in horses, i.e., diseases whose labels contain both 'epilepsy' and 'horse'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'epilepsy' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'horse' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find diseases whose labels contain 'infantil' and whose label or description contains 'fatal'. Return their label, ID, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'infantil' AND (d.Label CONTAINS 'fatal' OR d.Description CONTAINS 'fatal') RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.ID AS ID, d.URI AS URI

question: Find diseases whose labels contain 'poisoning' and show how they are classified (use LABELS(d)).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'poisoning' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Find the disease that has the ID 'MONDO:0013150'. Return all its properties (i.e., the entire node).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {ID: 'MONDO:0013150'}) RETURN d

question: Find the disease characterized by the URI 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MONDO_0011451'. Return all its properties (i.e., the entire node).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {URI: 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MONDO_0011451'}) RETURN d

question: Find diseases whose URI contains the string 'MONDO_0013472'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.URI CONTAINS 'MONDO_0013472' RETURN d.Label, d.URI

question: Return all diseases whose labels do not contain 'depletion' nor 'DNA'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'DNA' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'depletion' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Return all diseases whose label or description mention 'rnaseh1 gene'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'rnaseh1 gene' OR d.Description CONTAINS 'rnaseh1 gene' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description AS Description

question: Count all diseases whose descriptions mention both 'gene' and 'mutation'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'gene' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'mutation' RETURN COUNT(d) AS DiseaseCount

question: Find dog and cat diseases, i.e., diseases whose label contains both the words 'dog' and 'cat'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'cat' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'dog' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find cancers whose labels contain 'breast' and also contain 'familial'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'breast' AND c.Label CONTAINS 'familial' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find all cancers whose labels contain 'lung' and 'carcinoma'; the latter as a standalone word (i.e., without any prefixes).
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'lung' AND c.Label =~ '.*\bcarcinoma\b.*' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find all cancers whose labels contain 'squamous' but do not contain 'carcinoma'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'squamous' AND NOT c.Label CONTAINS 'carcinoma' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Return all properties of the cancer labeled 'lung carcinoma'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer {Label:'lung carcinoma'}) RETURN c

question: Find cancers that have at least three additional disease classification.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE SIZE(LABELS(c)) > 3 RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, LABELS(c) AS Classifications

question: Find cancers that are also infectious diseases and autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c:Infectious_disease AND c:Autoimmune_disease RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, LABELS(c) AS Classifications

question: Find cancers that are also autoimmune diseases and also either neurodegenerative diseases or infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c:Autoimmune_disease AND (c:Neurodegenerative_disease OR c:Infectious_disease) RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, LABELS(c) AS Classifications

question: Find cancers whose labels contain the word 'malignant' that are also cardiovascular disease.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c:Cardiovascular_disease AND c.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find cancers that are cardiovascular disease and whose labels contain the string 'oma'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c:Cardiovascular_disease AND c.Label CONTAINS 'oma' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find cancers whose ID ends with the string '743'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.ID ENDS WITH '743' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.ID AS CancerID

question: Find the cancer that has the ID 'MONDO:0200000' and return all its properties (i.e., return the entire node).
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer {ID: 'MONDO:0200000'}) RETURN c

question: Find cancers described as 'extremely rare'. Return their label, ID and URI.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'extremely rare' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.ID AS ID, c.URI AS URI

question: Find cancers whose IDs contain five consecutive zeros.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.ID =~ '.*0{5,}.*' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.ID AS CancerID

question: Find cancers whose description contains the string 'benign polypoid'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'benign polypoid' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS Description

question: Find cancers whose labels contain the word 'polyp' as a standalone word and whose descriptions do not contain 'benign' or 'non-neoplastic'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label =~ '.*\bpolyp\b.*' AND NOT c.Description CONTAINS 'benign' AND NOT c.Description CONTAINS 'non-neoplastic' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS Description

question: Find all cancers whose descriptions mention 'controversy'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'controversy' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the cancers whose descriptions contain 'some authors', return their label and identifier (ID).
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'some authors' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.ID AS ID

question: Find cancers whose label or description contain 'malignant' and whose description contains 'variant'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE (c.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' OR c.Description CONTAINS 'malignant') AND c.Description CONTAINS 'variant' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.URI AS CancerURI

question: Which cardiovascular diseases are also classified as 'Infectious_disease'?
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd:Infectious_disease RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(cd) AS Classifications

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose label or description contains the word 'fatal'. Return their label and the ID.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.Description CONTAINS 'fatal' OR cd.Label CONTAINS 'fatal' RETURN cd.Label, cd.ID

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose IDs contain five consecutive zeros.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.ID =~ '.*0{5,}.*' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, cd.ID AS DiseaseID

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose ID ends with '555'. Return all the properties (i.e., return the entire node).
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.ID ENDS WITH '555' RETURN cd

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose descriptions mention both 'gene' and 'mutation'. Return the labels and the IDs.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.Description CONTAINS 'gene' AND cd.Description CONTAINS 'mutation' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, cd.ID AS DiseaseID

question: Retrieve the descriptions of the cardiovascular diseases where the gene 'TNNI3' is mentioned (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE toLower(cd.Description) CONTAINS 'tnni3' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, cd.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the labels of cardiovascular diseases whose descriptions mention 'chromosome 22'.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.Description CONTAINS 'chromosome 22' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: List all cardiovascular diseases whose labels contain 'leber' (case-insensitive) and that are not cancers and return their label and node types (i.e., LABELS(Cardiovascular_disease)) to show how they are classified.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE toLower(cd.Label) CONTAINS 'leber' AND NOT cd:Cancer RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(cd) AS Classifications

question: List all cardiovascular diseases whose labels contain the string 'noonan' (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE toLower(cd.Label) CONTAINS 'noonan' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find autoimmune diseases whose labels contain the string 'anemia' and whose descriptions contain the string 'aiha'.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE ad.Label CONTAINS 'anemia' AND ad.Description CONTAINS 'aiha' RETURN ad.Label AS DiseaseLabel, ad.Description AS Description

question: Find autoimmune diseases whose labels contain 'sclerosis' and whose label or description contains either 'rare' or 'acute'. Return only labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE ad.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' AND (ad.Label CONTAINS 'rare' OR ad.Label CONTAINS 'acute' OR ad.Description CONTAINS 'rare' OR ad.Description CONTAINS 'acute') RETURN ad.Label AS DiseaseLabel, ad.ID AS ID

question: Find autoimmune diseases that are also cancers, and at the same time are also either neurodegenerative diseases or infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d:Cancer AND (d:Neurodegenerative_disease OR d:Infectious_disease) RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Find autoimmune diseases that are also cancers and whose labels mention the gene 'STAT3'.
