cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d:Cancer AND d.Label CONTAINS 'STAT3' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Return all properties of the autoimmune disease labeled as 'Castleman-Kojima disease'.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease {Label:'Castleman-Kojima disease'}) RETURN ad

question: Find all autoimmune diseases whose label contains 'diabete' and whose description mentions the gene 'sumo4' (case-insensitive). Return all the properties for matching nodes.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'diabete' AND toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'sumo4' RETURN PROPERTIES(d)

question: Retrieve the autoimmune diseases whose label contains 'diabete' and whose description mentions 'chromosome 11'. Return their label, description, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'diabete' AND toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'chromosome 11' RETURN d.Label, d.Description, d.URI

question: List the description of all autoimmune diseases whose label contains 'celiac' and whose description is not null.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'celiac' AND d.Description IS NOT NULL RETURN d.Label, d.Description

question: Count how many autoimmune diseases have labels containing 'celiac disease, susceptibility to'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'celiac disease, susceptibility to' RETURN COUNT(d) AS count

question: Retrieve all the properties of the mental disease labeled 'Keshan disease'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease {Label:'phobia'}) RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description mention the 'american psychiatric association'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'american psychiatric association' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find the mental disease whose ID contains '122'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE d.ID CONTAINS '122' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.ID

question: Find all mental diseases whose description mentions 'fear'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'fear' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description contains 'anxiety' but whose label does not contain 'depress'. Return their label and description.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'anxiety' AND NOT toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'depress' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description contains 'consciousness' or 'cognitive'. Return their label, description, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'consciousness' OR toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'cognitive' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description, d.URI

question: Find mental diseases whose description mention the name 'SUE' (case-insensitive) and also contains at least one of 'David', 'Derald', or 'Stanley' (all case-insensitive). Return their label and description.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'sue' AND (toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'david' OR toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'derald' OR toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'stanley') RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description contains the word 'mood' but whose label does not contain 'mood'. Return their label and description.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'mood' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'mood' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description contains the word 'sadness'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'sadness' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.URI

question: Find the mental disease that has the URI 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MFOMD_0000001', and return its label and description.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease {URI: 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MFOMD_0000001'}) RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description mentions 'psychotropic medications', and return its label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'psychotropic medications' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel, i.ID

question: Find the infectious diseases whose labels contain the word 'tuberculosis' and that are also cardiovascular diseases.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Label CONTAINS 'tuberculosis' AND i:Cardiovascular_disease RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabeltuberculosis, labels(i)

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description contain 'contagious'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'contagious' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel, i.URI

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description contain 'mosquito' or 'fly'. Return their label and the ID.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'mosquito' OR i.Description CONTAINS 'fly' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel, i.ID

question: Find the infectious diseases whose labels do not ends with 'osis' and whose description contains the word 'mortality' or the word 'death'. Return only disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE NOT i.Label ENDS WITH 'osis' AND (i.Description CONTAINS 'mortality' OR i.Description CONTAINS 'death') RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description mention the book 'principles of neurology', and return their label.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'principles of neurology' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description contains 'asia' but does not contain 'africa'. Return diseases' label.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'principles of neurology' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find infectious diseases such that their: 1) labels or description contain 'influenza'; 2) their description contain a number followed by 'day'. Return only the label.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description =~ '.*[0-9]+\s*day.*' AND (i.Label CONTAINS 'influenza' OR i.Description CONTAINS 'influenza') RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Retrieve the description of the 'cardiac tuberculosis'-labeled infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease{Label:'cardiac tuberculosis'}) RETURN i.Description

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases whose labels contain 'dementia' but not 'sclerosis'.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'dementia' AND NOT n.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases whose labels contain 'sclerosis' but they are not autoimmune diseases nor cancers.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' AND NOT n:Autoimmune_disease AND NOT n:Cancer RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(n)

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases whose labels contain 'sclerosis' and they are also either autoimmune diseases or cancers.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' AND n:Autoimmune_disease OR n:Cancer RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(n)

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases whose labels or description contain 'chronic' but that are not autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE (n.Label CONTAINS 'chronic' OR n.Description CONTAINS 'chronic') AND NOT n:Autoimmune_disease RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(n)

question: Retrieve the description of neurodegenerative diseases whose label contain 'parkinson' (if the node property 'Description' is available).
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'parkinson' AND n.Description IS NOT NULL RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, n.Description

question: Retrieve all available information (i.e., the entire node) about the neurodegenerative disease labeled 'Huntington disease-like syndrome due to C9ORF72 expansions'.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease {Label: 'Huntington disease-like syndrome due to C9ORF72 expansions'}) RETURN n

question: Retrieve all the available information (i.e., the entire node) about the neurodegenerative disease with the following ID:'MONDO:0002960'.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease {ID:'MONDO:0002960'}) RETURN n

question: Find the neurodegenerative diseases whose labels contain 'Alzheimer' while their description mention the gene PLD3 (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'Alzheimer' AND n.Description CONTAINS 'pld3' RETURN n.Label, n.Description

question: Find the neurodegenerative diseases such that their: 1) labels contain 'epilepsy'; 2) their description mention gene mutation containing the term 'gene' and the term 'mutation'.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'epilepsy' AND n.Description CONTAINS 'mutation' AND n.Description CONTAINS 'gene' RETURN n.Label,n.Description

question: List all biological processes whose labels contain 'nitrogen starvation'. Return their full label and also the ID.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'nitrogen starvation' RETURN bp.Label, bp.ID

question: How many biological processes have labels that contain 'negative regulation'?
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'negative regulation' RETURN COUNT(bp)

question: How many biological process nodes are there, what are their labels, and which species are they associated with?
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) RETURN COUNT(bp), LABELS(bp), bp.Species

question: List the labels of all biological process nodes that belong to the species 'Metazoa'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Species = 'Metazoa' RETURN bp.Label

question: Return the species associated with the biological process labeled 'pigmentation'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label:'pigmentation'}) RETURN bp.Species

question: Return all properties (i.e., the entire node) of the 'muscle structure development'-labeled biological process.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label:'muscle structure development'}) RETURN bp

question: List the labels of all biological processes that belong to the species 'Eumetazoa' and do not contain the word 'regulation' in their labels.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Species = 'Eumetazoa' AND NOT bp.Label CONTAINS 'regulation' RETURN bp.Label

question: Retrieve the description and the species of the biological process labeled as 'female pregnancy'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label: 'female pregnancy'}) RETURN bp.Description, bp.Species

question: List all biological processes whose labels contain 'insulin' and also contain either the word 'positive' or 'negative'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'insulin' AND (bp.Label CONTAINS 'positive' OR bp.Label CONTAINS 'negative') RETURN bp.Label

question: List all biological processes whose labels contain 'cardiac muscle' but do not contain either the word 'positive' or 'negative'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'cardiac muscle' AND NOT (bp.Label CONTAINS 'positive' OR bp.Label CONTAINS 'negative') RETURN bp.Label

question: List all biological processes whose label or description contains 'action potential' and whose description contains either the string 'from the soma' or 'towards the soma'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE (bp.Label CONTAINS 'action potential' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'action potential') AND (bp.Description CONTAINS 'from the soma' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'towards the soma') RETURN bp.Label, bp.Description

question: Find all biological processes whose labels contain 'blood-brain barrier'. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'blood-brain barrier' RETURN bp.Label, bp.ID

question: Return all the available properties for the biological process with ID 'GO:0090211'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {ID:'GO:0090211'}) RETURN bp

question: Return the label and description of the biological process with URI 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0019227'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {URI:'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0019227'}) RETURN bp.Label, bp.Description

question: Find biological processes whose labels contain 'bone marrow' and whose descriptions contain 'cell death'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'bone marrow' AND bp.Description CONTAINS 'cell death' RETURN bp.Label, bp.URI

question: List all biological processes belonging to the species 'cellular organisms' whose descriptions contain 'steady state'. Return their label, description, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Species = 'cellular organisms' AND bp.Description CONTAINS 'steady state' RETURN bp.Label, bp.Description, bp.URI

question: List all biological processes whose descriptions contain 'level of the cell'. Return the label and the URI.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Description CONTAINS 'level of the cell' RETURN bp.Label, bp.URI

question: Find all biological processes whose descriptions contain either the string 'progression of the cell' or 'death of the cell'. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Description CONTAINS 'progression of the cell' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'death of the cell' RETURN bp.Label, bp.ID

question: Count all GO terms, list their labels, and indicate which species they are associated with.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) RETURN COUNT(g), LABELS(g), g.Species

question: Find the label of all GO terms that are not biological processes, molecular functions, or cellular components, and whose labels contain the word 'inhibitor'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE (g:GO AND NOT g:Biological_process AND NOT g:Molecular_function AND NOT g:Cellular_component) AND g.Label CONTAINS 'inhibitor' RETURN g.Label

question: Find the classification of GO terms whose IDs start with 'GOCHE'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.ID STARTS WITH 'GOCHE' RETURN DISTINCT LABELS(g) AS Classification

question: Return the distinct classifications of all GO terms whose IDs start with 'GO:'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.ID STARTS WITH 'GO:' RETURN DISTINCT LABELS(g) AS Classification

question: Retrieve labels and URIs of all GO terms that are not biological processes, molecular functions, or cellular components, and whose labels contain the string ' EC' (be careful, there's a space before EC).
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g:GO AND (NOT g:Biological_process AND NOT g:Molecular_function AND NOT g:Cellular_component) AND g.Label CONTAINS ' EC' RETURN g.Label, g.URI

question: List the labels and classifications (i.e., LABELS(node)) of all GO terms whose labels contain both the keywords 'DNA' and 'RNA', and whose label or description also contains the string 'gene silencing'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'DNA' AND g.Label CONTAINS 'RNA' AND (g.Label CONTAINS 'gene silencing' OR g.Description CONTAINS 'gene silencing') RETURN g.Label, LABELS(g)

question: Find the GO terms whose IDs end with '76668'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.ID ENDS WITH '76668' RETURN g.Label, g.ID

question: Retrieve the description of the 'provirus excision' GO term.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO {Label:'provirus excision'}) RETURN g.Description

question: Find all GO terms whose labels contain 'regulation' and whose descriptions contain 'antiviral response'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'regulation' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'antiviral response' RETURN g.Label, g.Description

question: List the labels of GO terms whose labels contain both the strings 'envenomation' and 'negative regulation'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'envenomation' AND g.Label CONTAINS 'negative regulation' RETURN g.Label

question: List GO terms whose label contains the word 'modulation' and also contain either the word 'virus' or 'viral'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'modulation' AND (g.Label CONTAINS 'virus' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'viral') RETURN g.Label

question: Find GO terms whose labels contain the string 'genome replication' but do NOT contain 'regulation' nor 'modulation'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'genome replication' AND NOT (g.Label CONTAINS 'regulation' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'modulation') RETURN g.Label

question: Find how are classified (i.e., use LABELS(node)) GO terms whose labels contain 'genome' but do not contain either 'replication' or 'viral'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'genome' AND NOT (g.Label CONTAINS 'replication' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'viral') RETURN g.Label, LABELS(g)

question: Find GO terms whose labels contain 'plasma', do not contain 'membrane', and are not biological processes.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'plasma' AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS 'membrane' AND NOT g:Biological_process RETURN g.Label, LABELS(g)

question: Find GO terms whose labels contain 'dopamine' and whose descriptions contain both the words 'catalysis' and '+'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'dopamine' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'catalysis' AND g.Description CONTAINS '+' RETURN DISTINCT g.Label, g.Description

question: Find labels and IDs of all GO terms whose descriptions mention the small interfering RNAs 'sirnas' (case insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE toLower(g.Description) CONTAINS 'sirnas' RETURN g.Label, g.ID

question: List GO terms whose label contains 'transcription' and either 'snoRNA' or 'sno(s)RNA'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'transcription' AND (g.Label CONTAINS 'snoRNA' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'sno(s)RNA') RETURN g.Label

question: List GO terms whose labels contain the word 'miRNA' and also contain either the word 'binding' or the word 'transcription'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'miRNA' AND (g.Label CONTAINS 'binding' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'transcription') RETURN g.Label

question: Find molecular functions whose descriptions contain the string 'small nucleolar rna'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'small nucleolar rna' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: Return all information (i.e., the entire node with all its properties) of the molecular function labeled as 'piRNA cluster binding'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function {Label:'piRNA cluster binding'}) RETURN mf

question: Find labels and URIs of the molecular functions that belong to the species 'Eumetazoa'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Species = 'Eumetazoa' RETURN mf.Label, mf.URI

question: Find the molecular functions that do not belong to the species 'Eumetazoa'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Species <> 'Eumetazoa' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Species

question: List all molecular functions whose labels contain the string 'alcohol O' and whose descriptions contain the string 'catalysis of the reaction'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'alcohol O' AND mf.Description CONTAINS 'catalysis of the reaction' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: Return the labels of all molecular functions that contain the word 'gene' as a standalone word in their labels.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE  mf.Label =~ '.*\bgene\b.*' RETURN mf.Label

question: Which molecular functions have labels containing 'bone' but descriptions that do not contain 'catalysis'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'bone' AND NOT mf.Description CONTAINS 'catalysis' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: List the molecular functions that are characterized by a property named 'Synonym'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Synonym IS NOT NULL RETURN mf.Label, mf.Synonym

question: Find the molecular functions such that none of the synonyms is identical to the label.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE NONE(s IN mf.Synonym WHERE s = mf.Label) RETURN mf.Label, mf.Synonym

question: Find labels and URIs of molecular functions whose labels contain the word 'anion' and whose labels or descriptions contain the word 'transmembrane'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'anion' AND (mf.Label CONTAINS 'transmembrane' OR mf.Description CONTAINS 'transmembrane') RETURN mf.Label, mf.ID

question: Find the molecular functions that have label or synonyms containing the term 'monoatomic'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'monoatomic' OR mf.Synonym CONTAINS 'monoatomic' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Synonym

question: Find the molecular function that have a synonym named 'molecular_function'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE 'molecular_function' IN mf.Synonym RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, mf.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Retrieve the molecular functions whose IDs end with '0128'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.ID ENDS WITH '0128' RETURN mf.Label, mf.ID

question: List labels of molecular functions whose labels or descriptions contain the string '-gated' and whose descriptions do not start with 'enables'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE (mf.Label CONTAINS '-gated' OR mf.Description CONTAINS '-gated') AND NOT mf.Description STARTS WITH 'enables' RETURN mf.Label

question: List molecular functions whose: 1) labels contain the string 'G-protein'; 2) descriptions contain 'potassium'; and 3) descriptions do not contain 'binding'. Return only their labels.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE (mf.Label CONTAINS 'G-protein' AND mf.Description CONTAINS 'potassium') AND NOT mf.Description CONTAINS 'binding' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: List all molecular functions whose labels contain the string 'pH' and also contain either the word 'calcium' or 'sodium'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'pH' AND (mf.Label CONTAINS 'calcium' OR mf.Label CONTAINS 'sodium') RETURN mf.Label

question: List all molecular functions whose labels contain the string 'gated ' without a dash ('-') before it.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'gated ' AND NOT mf.Label CONTAINS '-gated' RETURN mf.Label

question: Find molecular functions that contain the word 'light' without a '-' before or after it.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'light' AND NOT mf.Label CONTAINS '-light' AND NOT mf.Label CONTAINS 'light-' RETURN mf.Label

question: Find the phenotypes whose: 1) labels contain 'kinase'; 2) descriptions contain 'increased'; and 3) descriptions contain either 'concentration' or 'level'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE (p.Label CONTAINS 'kinase' AND p.Description CONTAINS 'increased') AND (p.Description CONTAINS 'concentration' OR p.Description CONTAINS 'level') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Description

question: Find the phenotypes that are characterized by the Chinese synonym '肌酸磷酸激酶极度上升'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE '肌酸磷酸激酶极度上升' IN p.Synonym RETURN p.Label

question: Which phenotypes are characterized by IDs ending with '0233'?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.ID ENDS WITH '0233' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.ID AS PhenotypeID

question: Which phenotypes have labels starting with the word 'Anti', contain 'antibody', and do NOT contain 'positivity'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label STARTS WITH 'Anti' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'antibody' AND NOT p.Label CONTAINS 'positivity' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Find the phenotypes whose labels contain the word 'collagen' and also contain either 'Increased' or 'Elevated'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'collagen' AND (p.Label CONTAINS 'Increased' OR p.Label CONTAINS 'Elevated') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: List the phenotypes whose IDs start with 'HP:600000'. Return their label, synonyms, and ID.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.ID STARTS WITH 'HP:600000' RETURN p.Label AS PhenotypeLabel, p.Synonym AS PhenotypeSynonym, p.ID

question: Retrieve labels and URIs of the phenotypes whose labels contain either 'BB' or 'MM'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'BB' OR p.Label CONTAINS 'MM' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.URI

question: Which phenotypes are characterized by synonyms written in non-ASCII characters but that do include the string 'BB'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s =~ '.*[^\x00-\x7F].*' AND s CONTAINS 'BB') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Which phenotypes have labels containing the word 'isoform' and descriptions that include the standalone terms 'mb', 'bb', or 'mm'?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'isoform' AND p.Description =~ '.*\b(mb|bb|mm)\b.*' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Description

question: Find the phenotypes whose: 1) labels contain both the words 'muscle' and 'weakness'; 2) descriptions contain the string 'decreased strength'; 3) descriptions do NOT contain the word 'generalized'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'muscle' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'weakness' AND p.Description CONTAINS 'decreased strength' AND NOT p.Description CONTAINS 'generalized' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Description

question: Find phenotypes whose labels contain 'Neck muscle' and whose descriptions do not contain the word 'strength'. Return nodes' label, description, and synonyms.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'Neck muscle' AND NOT p.Description CONTAINS 'strength' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Description, p.Synonym

question: Retrieve the phenotype whose label and synonyms both contain 'Holster'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'Holster' AND ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'Holster') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym

question: Return all the information of the phenotype that has the Spanish synonym 'Fractura de olécranon'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE 'Fractura de olécranon' IN p.Synonym RETURN p

question: Find the phenotypes that have the Spanish synonym 'Fontanela hundida'. Return their label, synonyms, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE 'Fontanela hundida' IN p.Synonym RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym, p.URI

question: List the description, synonyms, and URI of the phenotype labeled as 'Cotard delusion'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label: 'Cotard delusion'}) RETURN p.Description, p.Synonym, p.URI

question: Which phenotypes have labels containing the string 'zona pellucida' and descriptions containing either the word 'abnormal' or 'reduced'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'zona pellucida' AND (p.Description CONTAINS 'abnormal' OR p.Description CONTAINS 'reduced') RETURN p.Label, p.Description

question: Find the cellular components whose labels contain 'protein kinase' and whose descriptions contain 'enzyme'. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'protein kinase' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'enzyme' RETURN cc.Label, cc.ID

question: Find the cellular components whose labels contain 'intracellular' and whose descriptions contain the string 'a network of proteins'. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'intracellular' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'a network of proteins' RETURN cc.Label, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'chromosome' and explicitly refer to chromosome 'X', 'Y', or 'Z' in their label?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'chromosome' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'X' OR cc.Label CONTAINS 'Y' OR cc.Label CONTAINS 'Z') RETURN cc.Label, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the standalone word 'active'?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label =~ '.*\bactive\b.*' RETURN cc.Label

question: Which cellular component is characterized by the GO identifier 'GO:0098578'?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component {ID: 'GO:0098578'}) RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'presynaptic' but do not contain the word 'active'? Return nodes' labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'presynaptic' AND NOT cc.Label CONTAINS 'active' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing 'lipid' and either have 'oleosins' in their label or in their description? Return only nodes' properties named 'Label' and 'URI'
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'lipid' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'oleosins' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'oleosins') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.URI

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing 'synaptic' and mention a distance expressed as a number followed by 'nm' in their description? Return their label, description and ID.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'synaptic' AND cc.Description =~ '.*[0-9]+\s*nm.*' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the string 'active zone' and either contain the string 'cytoskelet' in their label or in their description? Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'active zone' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'cytoskelet' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'cytoskelet') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.URI

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing 'Golgi' and either contain 'ER' (i.e., an abbreviation for 'Endoplasmic Reticulum') in their label or the full string 'endoplasmic reticulum' in their description (case-insensitive)? Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE toLower(cc.Label) CONTAINS 'golgi' AND (toLower(cc.Label) CONTAINS 'er' OR toLower(cc.Description) CONTAINS 'endoplasmic reticulum') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'network' and either contain the word 'side' in their label or 'leaflet' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'network' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'side' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'leaflet') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description

question: Which cellular components have labels containing the string 'host cell' and contain the word 'antibodies' either in their label or in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'host cell' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'antibodies' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'antibodies') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description

question: Return all the available properties (i.e., the entire database node) about the 'presynaptic periactive zone'-labeled cellular component.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component {Label: 'presynaptic periactive zone'}) RETURN cc

question: List the cellular components whose labels contain the keyword 'RNA' preceded by the characters 'm', 't', or 'sn'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label =~ '.*\b(m|t|sn)RNA\b.*' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Find the cellular components whose labels contain the word 'polymerase' followed by a Roman numeral.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label =~ '.*polymerase\s+[IVXLCDM]+.*' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Retrieve the cellular components whose ID starts with 'GO:009857' and whose label does not contain the word 'chromosome'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.ID STARTS WITH 'GO:009857' AND NOT cc.Label CONTAINS 'chromosome' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Find the cellular components whose labels or descriptions contain the word 'leaflet', but whose labels and descriptions do not contain 'lumen'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE (cc.Label CONTAINS 'leaflet' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'leaflet') AND NOT (cc.Label CONTAINS 'lumen' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'lumen') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the acronym 'PML' (case-insensitive) or descriptions containing the full string 'promyelocytic leukemia'? Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE toLower(cc.Label) CONTAINS 'pml' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'promyelocytic leukemia' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.URI

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'matrix' and descriptions containing either the string 'extracellular' or 'synaptic cleft'? Return their labels.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'matrix' AND (cc.Description CONTAINS 'extracellular' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'synaptic cleft') RETURN cc.Label

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'DNA' preceded by a lower-case character, such as 'rDNA'?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label =~ '.*[a-z]DNA.*' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which miRNA are characterized by genomic coordinates located on the positive strand of the chromosome Y (e.g., chrY:123-132+) ?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY' AND coord ENDS WITH '+') RETURN m.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates

question: Which pre-miRNA have genomic coordinate located on the negative strand of the chromosome 21 (i.e., the coordinates end with '-') ?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr21' AND coord ENDS WITH '-') RETURN p.Label, p.Genomic_coordinates

question: Identify genes that are pseudogenes characterized by a synonym containing: 1) the word 'pseudogene' and 2) the word 'DEAD'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'pseudogene' AND syn CONTAINS 'DEAD') RETURN g.Label, g.Synonym

question: Identify genes that have a synonym containing 'DEAD' but do not have the word 'pseudogene' within the same synonym.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'DEAD' AND NOT syn CONTAINS 'pseudogene') RETURN g.Label, g.Synonym

question: Identify genes that have a synonym containing 'ribosomal' and are not pseudogenes (i.e., they do not have 'pseudogene' in their synonym). Return the genes' label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'ribosomal' AND NOT syn CONTAINS 'pseudogene') RETURN g.Label

question: Identify genes that have a synonym containing the word 'cancer' and also contain either the word 'antigen' or 'isomerase'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'cancer' AND (syn CONTAINS 'antigen' OR syn CONTAINS 'isomerase')) RETURN g.Label, g.Synonym

question: Find all genes whose label contains the symbol 'MIR127' and order them by sequence length, breaking ties alphabetically by label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'MIR127' RETURN g.Label, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS sequence_length ORDER BY sequence_length DESC, g.Label ASC

question: Which miRNAs whose sequences contain both the motifs 'CCCCCCC' and 'GGG' do regulate the activity of genes? Return the labels of those miRNAs and of the regulated genes.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCCCCC' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGG' RETURN m.Label, g.Label

question: Which miRNAs regulate the activity of genes such that both the miRNA and the gene are both characterized by at least one genomic coordinates' item starting with 'chr22'? Return their labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr22') AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr22') RETURN m.Label, g.Label

question: Which miRNAs regulate the activity of genes such that: 1) the miRNA is characterized by at least one genomic coordinates' item starting with 'chr1:' or 'chr2:'; 2) the gene is characterized by at least one genomic coordinates' item starting with 'chrY'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE (coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:' OR coord STARTS WITH 'chr2:')) AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN m.Label, g.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates, g.Genomic_coordinates

question: Find all miRNAs that regulate the activity of genes whose labels are exactly 2 letters long.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(g.Label) = 2 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Find the label of all genes whose activity is regulated by the miRNA labeled as 'hsa-miR-34a-3p'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-34a-3p'})-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) RETURN g.Label AS Gene

question: Find all miRNAs that regulate the activity of the gene 'KL'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label:'KL'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find miRNAs that develop from another miRNA such that the parent sequence is exactly 100 nucleotides longer.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m1.Sequence) + 100 = SIZE(m2.Sequence) RETURN m1.Label AS miRNA, m2.Label AS Parent_miRNA, SIZE(m1.Sequence) AS sequence_length, SIZE(m2.Sequence) AS parent_sequence_length

question: Find miRNAs that develop from another miRNA such that the latter miRNA's label contains the word 'loop'.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE m2.Label CONTAINS 'loop' RETURN m1.Label AS miRNA, m2.Label AS Parent_miRNA

question: Find miRNAs with genomic coordinates on chrX that develop from a miRNA with genomic coordinates not on chrX.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m1.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND NONE(coord IN m2.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN m1.Label AS miRNA, m2.Label AS Parent_miRNA, m1.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_coords, m2.Genomic_coordinates AS parent_coords

question: Find miRNAs that develop from another miRNA such that both are characterized by genomic coordinates on chr21.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m1.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr21') AND ANY(coord IN m2.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr21') RETURN m1.Label AS miRNA, m2.Label AS Parent_miRNA, m1.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_coords, m2.Genomic_coordinates AS parent_coords

question: Find the average length of miRNAs that develop from another miRNA. Compute also the average length of the latter.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(m2:miRNA) RETURN AVG(SIZE(m1.Sequence)) AS average_miRNA_length, AVG(SIZE(m2.Sequence)) AS average_parent_length

question: For each miRNAs, identify the pre-miRNAs that developed from them and return the maximum length of their sequences.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(m2:miRNA) RETURN MAX(SIZE(m1.Sequence)) AS max_miRNA_length, MAX(SIZE(m2.Sequence)) AS max_parent_length

question: For each miRNAs, identify the pre-miRNAs that developed from them and return the minimum length of their sequences.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(m2:miRNA) RETURN MIN(SIZE(m1.Sequence)) AS min_miRNA_length, MIN(SIZE(m2.Sequence)) AS min_parent_length

question: Find miRNAs that develop from another miRNA where the miRNA label ends with a letter other than 'a', 'b', or 'c' (case-insensitive) followed by '-5p'.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE m1.Label =~ '.*[d-zD-Z]-5p$' RETURN m1.Label AS miRNA, m2.Label AS Parent_miRNA, m1.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, m2.Sequence AS parent_sequence

question: Find miRNAs with genomic coordinates on chrX that develop from pre-miRNAs not on chrX.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND NONE(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, p.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_coords, p.Genomic_coordinates AS pre_miRNA_coords

question: Find the maximum length of miRNAs and of their corresponfìding pre-miRNAs for all miRNAs that develop from a pre-miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(p:pre_miRNA) RETURN MAX(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS max_miRNA_length, MAX(SIZE(p.Sequence)) AS max_pre_miRNA_length

question: Find miRNAs that develop from a pre-miRNA such that the pre-miRNA sequence is exactly twice the length of the miRNA sequence.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(p:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) * 2 = SIZE(p.Sequence) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, p.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS miRNA_sequence_length, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS pre_miRNA_sequence_length

question: Find miRNAs that develop from a pre-miRNA where both sequences contain at least one 'CUUUUU' motif.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(p:pre_miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CUUUUU' AND p.Sequence CONTAINS 'CUUUUU' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, p.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, p.Sequence AS pre_miRNA_sequence

question: Find the average difference in sequence length between miRNAs and their corresponding pre-miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(p:pre_miRNA) RETURN AVG(SIZE(p.Sequence) - SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS average_length_diff

question: Find all miRNAs that develop from a pre-miRNA where the miRNA label ends with a letter other that 'a', 'b', 'c', or 'p' (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:develops_from]->(p:pre_miRNA) WHERE m.Label =~ '.*[d-oq-zD-OQ-Z]$' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, p.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, p.Sequence AS pre_miRNA_sequence

question: Find miRNAs that are under-expressed in a disease where the miRNA sequence contains at least two 'AAAAA'
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE (SIZE(SPLIT(m.Sequence, 'AAAAA')) - 1) >= 2 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence

question: Find the maximum length of all miRNAs that are under-expressed in a disease.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) RETURN MAX(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS max_miRNA_length

question: Find diseases that have miRNAs under-expressed and whose description contains the string 'two subtypes'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'two subtypes' RETURN DISTINCT d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Disease_description

question: Count the miRNAs that are under-expressed in diseases where the description contains the string 'two subtypes'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'two subtypes' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS num_miRNAs

question: Find the URIs of diseases where miRNAs are under-expressed and whose descriptions contain the string 'african countries'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'african countries' RETURN DISTINCT d.URI AS Disease_URI

question: Find all the diseases where the miRNA labeled as 'microRNA hsa-mir-625 precursor' is under-expressed. Return their ID and label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'microRNA hsa-mir-625 precursor'})-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) RETURN DISTINCT d.ID AS Disease_ID, d.Label AS Disease_label

question: Find miRNAs that are under-expressed in diseases whose label or description contains 'blood'. Consider only miRNAs ending with 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE (d.Label CONTAINS 'blood' OR d.Description CONTAINS 'blood') AND m.Label ENDS WITH 'precursor' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease_label, d.Description AS Disease_description

question: List cancers where the under-expressed miRNAs have a sequence containing a 'UUUUUUU' motif.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUUUUUU' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_Sequence, c.Label AS Cancer_label

question: Find the average sequence length of miRNAs under-expressed in cancers.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS average_miRNA_length

question: Count the number of Gs and Cs in the sequences of miRNAs under-expressed in the cancer labeled as 'invasive ductal breast carcinoma'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer{Label:'invasive ductal breast carcinoma'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer_label, SIZE([x IN SPLIT(m.Sequence, '') WHERE x = 'G']) AS num_G, SIZE([x IN SPLIT(m.Sequence, '') WHERE x = 'C']) AS num_C

question: Find cancers whose label or description contains 'breast' and in which under-expressed miRNAs have genomic coordinates on chromosome X. Return the distinct cancers' label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE (c.Label CONTAINS 'breast' OR c.Description CONTAINS 'breast') AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN DISTINCT c.Label AS Cancer_label

question: Find cancers whose label or description contains 'breast' and in which under-expressed miRNAs have genomic coordinates are not on chromosome Y. Return the distinct cancers' label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE (c.Label CONTAINS 'breast' OR c.Description CONTAINS 'breast') AND NONE(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN DISTINCT c.Label AS Cancer_label

question: List all cancers whose description contains the word 'common' and are characterized by under-expressed miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'common' RETURN DISTINCT c.Label AS Cancer_label

question: Find miRNAs under-expressed in phenotypes that have at least 8 synonyms containing non-English characters and digits (i.e., NOT a-z, A-Z, 0-9).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE SIZE([s IN p.Synonym WHERE s =~ '.*[^a-zA-Z0-9 ].*']) >= 8 RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA, p.Label AS Phenotype_label, p.Synonym AS Phenotype_synonyms

question: Find phenotypes whose synonyms contain the Japanese expression '卵巣新生物' and are characterized by under-expressed miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS '卵巣新生物') RETURN DISTINCT p.Label AS Phenotype_label, p.Synonym AS Phenotype_synonyms

question: Find phenotypes whose label or synonyms contain the special character 'č' and are characterized by under-expressed miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'č' OR  ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'č') RETURN DISTINCT p.ID AS Phenotype_ID, p.Label AS Phenotype_label, p.Synonym AS Phenotype_synonyms

question: Find phenotypes whose label contains 'Acute' and that are characterized by under-expressed miRNAs whose labels do not end with 'p' or 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'Acute' AND NOT m.Label ENDS WITH 'p' AND NOT m.Label ENDS WITH 'precursor' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype_label, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find miRNAs that are under-expressed in phenotypes whose label contains 'lung'. Moreover, filter only miRNAs that are located on chromosome 21 (chr21).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'lung' AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr21') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype_label, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_coordinates

question: Find all the phenotypes with under-expressed miRNAs having genomic coordinates on chrY.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype_label, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_coordinates

question: Find phenotypes with under-expressed miRNAs sequence longer than 120 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) > 120 RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype_label, m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS sequence_length

question: Find phenotypes that under express miRNAs and whose sequence is longer than 140 or shorter than 17 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) > 140 OR SIZE(m.Sequence) < 17 RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype_label, m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS sequence_length

question: Count the number of unique genomic coordinate arrays of miRNAs under-expressed in phenotypes whose label contains the word 'lung'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'lung' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m.Genomic_coordinates) AS num_unique_chromosomes

question: Find all miRNAs having the genomic coordinates on chr3 and whose sequence contains 'UUUUU' that are under-expressed in phenotypes whose label does NOT contain the word 'oma'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr3') AND NOT p.Label CONTAINS 'oma' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUUUU' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_coordinates, p.Label AS Phenotype_label

question: Which miRNAs located on chromosome 9 or 19 are under-expressed in biological processes? Return miRNAs' distinct label, and the associated processes' ID and label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr9') OR ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr19') RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA, b.ID AS Process_ID, b.Label AS Process_label

question: Which miRNAs are under-expressed in biological processes whose description contains 'defensive reaction'? Return miRNAs and associated processes' label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE b.Description CONTAINS 'defensive reaction' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, b.Label AS Process_label

question: List all miRNAs that are under-expressed in the biological process 'inflammatory response'. Return their labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(b:Biological_process {Label:'inflammatory response'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs are under-expressed in the biological process 'programmed necrotic cell death'? What are the source(s) claiming this under-expression?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(b:Biological_process {Label:'programmed necrotic cell death'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, r.Source AS Source

question: Return miRNAs under-expressed in biological processes such that this relationship (miRNA-under_expressed_in->Biological_process) is verified within the context 'cardiomyocyte progenitor cells'. Return the distinct processes' label, description and the entire set of contexts.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE ANY(c IN r.Context WHERE c = 'cardiomyocyte progenitor cells') RETURN DISTINCT b.Label AS Process_name, b.Description AS Process_description, r.Context AS Context

question: Find all miRNAs that are under-expressed in biological processes. Consider only relationships with more than ten associated contexts. Return the distinct label of miRNAs and biological processes, and the list of contexts as well.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE  SIZE(r.Context) > 10 RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA, b.Label AS Process_label, r.Context AS Context

question: Return all miRNAs under-expressed in biological processes such that the 'context' property characterizing this relationship contains the item 'hepg2 cells'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE ANY(c IN r.Context WHERE c = 'hepg2 cells') RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA, b.Label AS Process_label, r.Context AS Context

question: List all GO terms whose description contains the string 'dna damage' that under express miRNAs whose labels end with 'b-5p'. Return the miRNAs and the GO terms' labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(go:GO) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH 'b-5p' AND go.Description CONTAINS 'dna damage' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GO_term

question: List all miRNAs that are under-expressed in GO terms and are characterized by sequences ending with 'GGGG'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(go:GO) WHERE m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GGGG' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, go.Label AS GO_term

question: List all miRNAs that: 1) are under-expressed in GO terms; 2) are characterized by genomic coordinates exclusively on chromosome X; and 3) are characterized by a sequence length greater than 50.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(b:GO) WHERE ALL(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND SIZE(m.Sequence) > 50 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates, b.Label AS GO_term

question: List all miRNAs that: 1) are under-expressed in GO terms; 2) are characterized by genomic coordinates exclusively on chromosome X; and 3) are characterized by sequence length of exactly 18 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(b:GO) WHERE ALL(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 18 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates, b.Label AS GO_term

question: Find all GO terms in which miRNAs with a sequence length of exactly 18 nucleotides are under-expressed.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(go:GO) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) = 18 RETURN go.Label AS GO_term, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length

question: Which source(s) report the under-expression of the miRNA labelled as 'hsa-miR-500b-5p'? Which are the GO terms involved in the under-expression?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-500b-5p'})-[r:under_expressed_in]->(b:GO) RETURN r.Source AS Source, b.Label AS GO_term

question: List all miRNAs under-expressed in the GO term 'apoptotic process' such that the relationship (miRNA-under_expressed_in->GO) is characterized by context that contains the item 'cardiac'. Return the miRNA label and all relationship properties.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(b:GO {Label:'apoptotic process'}) WHERE r.Context IS NOT NULL AND ANY(c IN r.Context WHERE c = 'cardiac') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, properties(r) AS Relationship_properties

question: Find all miRNAs with sequence length greater than 100 that are under-expressed in GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(b:GO) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) > 100 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length, b.Label AS GO_term

question: Find miRNAs under-expressed in GO terms such that the context property of the relationship contains at least one item with the Greek letter 'β'. Return the miRNAs' label, sequence, and the entire set of contexts for the relationships.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(b:GO) WHERE ANY(c IN r.Context WHERE c CONTAINS 'β') RETURN b.Label AS GO_term, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, r.Context AS Context

question: List all miRNAs that are under-expressed in the cardiovascular disease labeled as 'cardiomyopathy'. Return only the miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease {Label:'cardiomyopathy'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: Retrieve the set of unique experimental methods used to report miRNA under-expression in cardiovascular diseases.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) UNWIND r.Method AS method RETURN DISTINCT method AS Method

question: Find cardiovascular diseases in which miRNAs are under-expressed, where the description contains both 'blood' and 'flow'. Return the disease and miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'blood' AND c.Description CONTAINS 'flow' RETURN c.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find all cardiovascular diseases in which miRNAs whose genomic coordinates start with 'chrX' are under-expressed.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN c.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates

question: Retrieve the top 3 miRNAs that are under-expressed in cardiovascular diseases, ordered by descending sequence length and, in case of ties, alphabetically by miRNA label. Return the miRNA label, sequence length, and genomic coordinates
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates ORDER BY SIZE(m.Sequence) DESC, m.Label ASC LIMIT 3

question: Find the cardiovascular diseases in which the 3 miRNAs with the longest sequence length are under-expressed. In case of ties in sequence length, order the miRNAs alphabetically by their label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) RETURN c.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length ORDER BY SIZE(m.Sequence) DESC, m.Label ASC LIMIT 3

question: Find the neurodegenerative diseases in which miRNAs whose genomic coordinates start with 'chrX' are under-expressed.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN n.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates

question: Which experimental methods report that certain miRNAs with sequence equal to 22 are under-expressed in neurodegenerative diseases whose description contains 'progressive'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Description CONTAINS 'progressive' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 22 RETURN r.Method AS Method, m.Label AS miRNA, n.Label AS Disease

question: List all distinct experimental methods used to report miRNA under-expression in neurodegenerative diseases.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(n:Neurodegenerative_disease) UNWIND r.Method AS method RETURN DISTINCT method AS Method

question: Which miRNAs with a sequence length of 23 are under-expressed in neurodegenerative diseases whose descriptions start with the string 'a progressive'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) = 23 AND n.Description STARTS WITH 'a progressive' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length, n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, n.Description AS DiseaseDescription

question: List all miRNAs that are under-expressed in the neurodegenerative disease labeled as 'multiple sclerosis'. Return only the miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(n:Neurodegenerative_disease {Label:'multiple sclerosis'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: List all sources that report under-expression of miRNAs in the neurodegenerative disease labeled as 'Parkinson disease'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(n:Neurodegenerative_disease {Label:'Parkinson disease'}) RETURN r.Source AS Source, m.Label AS miRNA

question: List all miRNAs that are under-expressed in autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(a:Autoimmune_disease) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, a.Label AS Disease

question: List all miRNAs under-expressed in autoimmune diseases whose sequence contains the motif 'AAGG'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(a:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAGG' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, a.Label AS Disease

question: List the genomic coordinates of miRNAs that are under-expressed in the autoimmune disease labeled as 'rheumatoid arthritis'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(a:Autoimmune_disease {Label:'rheumatoid arthritis'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Chromosomes

question: Find the average sequence length of miRNAs across all instances where they are under-expressed in autoimmune diseases
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(:Autoimmune_disease) RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS Average_Sequence_Length

question: Find the length of the shortest miRNA that is under-expressed in cardiovascular diseases.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) RETURN MIN(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS Shortest_Sequence_Length

question: Find the length of the longest miRNA that is under-expressed in cardiovascular diseases.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) RETURN MAX(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS Longest_Sequence_Length

question: List all infectious diseases in which miRNAs are under-expressed.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(i:Infectious_disease) RETURN DISTINCT i.Label AS Disease

question: List all sources reporting the under-expression of miRNAs in the infectious disease 'COVID-19'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(i:Infectious_disease {Label:'COVID-19'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, r.Source AS Source, i.Label AS Disease

question: List all miRNAs under-expressed in the infectious disease labeled 'viral infectious disease' and report the source.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(i:Infectious_disease {Label:'viral infectious disease'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, r.Source AS Source, i.Label AS InfectiousDisease

question: Find miRNAs under-expressed in infectious diseases where 'dbDEMC' is listed as a source.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(i:Infectious_disease) WHERE 'dbDEMC' IN r.Source RETURN i.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, r.Source AS Source

question: Which miRNAs with a sequence length of 21 are under-expressed in infectious diseases whose description starts with the string 'a malignant'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(i:Infectious_disease) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) = 21 AND i.Description STARTS WITH 'a malignant' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length, i.Label AS Disease

question: Which miRNAs with a sequence length greater than 20 and less than 24 are under-expressed in infectious diseases?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(i:Infectious_disease) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) > 20 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) < 24  RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS miRNA_sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Sequence_length, i.Label AS Disease

question: Find miRNAs that do not contain 'C' in the nucleotide sequence and that are under-expressed in infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(i:Infectious_disease) WHERE SIZE(SPLIT(m.Sequence, 'C')) - 1 = 0 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, i.Label AS Disease

question: List the diseases in which the miRNA 'hsa-miR-660-3p' is over-expressed. Return only the disease label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA{Label:'hsa-miR-660-3p'})-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.URI AS Disease_URI

question: Return the disease label, URI, and the Source, Method, and Context of the relationship 'miRNA 'hsa-miR-4271' - over-expressed in - disease'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-4271'})-[r:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.URI AS Disease_URI, r.Source AS Source, r.Method AS Method, r.Context AS Context

question: Return the miRNA label and genomic coordinates for the three longest-sequence miRNA–disease over-expression relationships, ordered by descending sequence length and, in case of ties, alphabetically by miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Chromosome ORDER BY SIZE(m.Sequence) DESC, m.Label ASC LIMIT 3

question: Find diseases whose labels contain the word 'childhood' and such that over-expressed miRNAs have genomic coordinates starting with 'chr21'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr21') AND d.Label CONTAINS 'childhood' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates

question: Find all phenotypes in which the miRNA 'hsa-miR-5692b' is over-expressed. Return the phenotype label and the source stating the over-expression.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-5692b'})-[r:over_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, r.Source AS Source

question: Find all phenotypes in which the miRNA 'hsa-miR-99a-5p' is over-expressed and this over-expression is measured with the method called 'microarray analysis'. Return the phenotype label and all the relationship sources and methods.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-99a-5p'})-[r:over_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE 'microarray analysis' IN r.Method RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, r.Source AS Source, r.Method AS Method

question: List biological processes in which the miRNA 'hsa-miR-372-3p' is over-expressed. Return biological processes' label and description.
cypher: MATCH (:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-372-3p'})-[:over_expressed_in]->(bp:Biological_process) RETURN bp.Label AS Biological_Process, bp.Description AS Description

question: Find biological processes where an over-expressed miRNA has a sequence shorter than 20 nucleotides and a genomic coordinate on chrX.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) < 20 AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN bp.Label AS Biological_Process, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates

question: Find the genomic coordinates of the top five miRNAs with the longest sequences that are over-expressed in biological processes. In case of ties in sequence length, order the miRNAs alphabetically by their label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(bp:Biological_process) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, bp.Label AS Biological_Process ORDER BY SIZE(m.Sequence) DESC, miRNA ASC LIMIT 5

question: Find biological processes where over-expressed miRNAs have no 'C' nucleotides in their sequence.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE SIZE(SPLIT(m.Sequence, 'C')) - 1 = 0 RETURN b.Label AS Biological_Process, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: List all GO terms in which over-expressed miRNAs do not end with 'p'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(g:GO) WHERE NOT m.Label ENDS WITH 'p' RETURN g.Label AS GO_Term, m.Label

question: List all miRNAs that are over-expressed in cardiovascular diseases, considering only miRNAs whose labels contain 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE m.Label CONTAINS 'precursor' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Disease

question: List all miRNAs that are over-expressed in the cardiovascular disease labeled 'myocardial infarction'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease {Label: 'myocardial infarction'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find all cardiovascular diseases that are characterized by over-expressed miRNAs located on chromosome 1 (using 'chr1:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN c.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases characterized by over-expressed miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(n:Neurodegenerative_disease) RETURN DISTINCT n.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find all neurodegenerative diseases characterized by over-expressed miRNAs located on chromosome 11.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr11:') RETURN n.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates

question: List all miRNAs that are over-expressed in autoimmune diseases whose descriptions mention ‘cognitive impairments’.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'cognitive impairments' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description AS DiseaseDescription

question: How many miRNAs are overexpressed in each autoimmune disease?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Autoimmune_disease) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, COUNT(m.Label) AS miRNA_Count

question: Find all the genomic coordinates of the miRNAs over-expressed in the autoimmune disease labeled as 'type 1 diabetes mellitus 1'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Autoimmune_disease {Label:'type 1 diabetes mellitus 1'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which miRNAs are over-expressed in infectious diseases whose label or description contains the word 'sarcoma'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'sarcoma' OR d.Description CONTAINS 'sarcoma' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS diseaseLabel, d.Description AS DiseaseDescription

question: Which miRNAs are over-expressed in infectious diseases that are also classified as cancers?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Infectious_disease:Cancer) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS disease

question: Which miRNAs with sequences starting with 'AA' or 'UU' motifs are over-expressed in infectious diseases?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Infectious_disease) WHERE m.Sequence STARTS WITH 'AA' OR m.Sequence STARTS WITH 'UU' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS disease

question: Find all infectious diseases that have over-expressed miRNAs located on chromosome 1: (using 'chr1:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(i:Infectious_disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN i.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_coordinates

question: Find all miRNAs that participate in biological processes with ‘DNA’ in the label and ‘protein’ in the label or description.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE (b.Label CONTAINS 'protein' OR b.Description CONTAINS 'protein') AND b.Label CONTAINS 'DNA' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, b.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Count the number of biological process participation relationships for miRNAs with genomic coordinates located on chromosome 14.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:participates_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr14:') RETURN COUNT(r) AS RelationshipCount

question: Find all biological processes whose label contains the string 'mitotic spindle' and in which miRNAs whose sequences do not contain 'C' participate. Return biological processes' label and miRNAs' label and sequence.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(b:Biological_process) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'C' AND b.Label CONTAINS 'mitotic spindle' RETURN b.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find the top five biological processes with the highest number of associated miRNAs. In case of ties, order the biological processes alphabetically by their label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(b:Biological_process) RETURN b.Label AS BiologicalProcess, COUNT(m) AS miRNA_Count ORDER BY miRNA_Count DESC, BiologicalProcess ASC LIMIT 5

question: Find all miRNAs with sequences longer than 25 nucleotides that participate in GO terms having a label that contains the word 'negative'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(g:GO) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) > 25 AND g.Label CONTAINS 'negative' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS GO_Term

question: Find all GO terms containing the standalone word 'gene', in which miRNAs participate.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(g:GO) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*\bgene\b.*' RETURN DISTINCT g.Label AS GO_Term

question: Find the genomic coordinates of miRNAs participating in the GO term labeled 'positive regulation of gene expression via chromosomal CpG island demethylation'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(g:GO {Label:'positive regulation of gene expression via chromosomal CpG island demethylation'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Count the sequence length of miRNAs whose labels contain 'ENSG' and participate in GO terms. Return miRNA label, GO term label, and sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(g:GO) WHERE m.Label CONTAINS 'ENSG' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS GO_Term, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Find all miRNAs and their genomic coordinates that participate in GO terms whose label contains the word 'ncRNA'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'ncRNA' RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find all miRNAs and the molecular functions in which they participate. Return: 1) the miRNA label; 2) the molecular function label, ID, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(mf:Molecular_function) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, mf.Label AS MolecularFunctionLabel, mf.ID AS MolecularFunctionID, mf.URI AS MolecularFunctionURI

question: Find miRNAs located on chromosome 19 that participate in molecular functions. Return the molecular function label and the list of associated miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(mf:Molecular_function) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr19:') RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, COLLECT(m.Label) AS miRNAs

question: Find all miRNAs with genomic coordinates located on chromosome 19 and the molecular functions they participate in. Return the miRNA label and genomic coordinates and the molecular function label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(mf:Molecular_function) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr19:') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Find all miRNAs that participate in molecular functions and have at least two occurrences of the string 'AA' in their sequence. Return miRNA label, sequence, and associated molecular function label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(mf:Molecular_function) WHERE SIZE(SPLIT(m.Sequence, 'AA')) - 1 >= 2 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Find miRNAs that participate in molecular functions and contain at least two occurrences of 'GG', ranked by sequence length. Ties should be resolved alphabetically by miRNA label. Return the miRNA label, sequence, sequence length, and associated molecular function label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(mf:Molecular_function) WHERE SIZE(SPLIT(m.Sequence, 'GG')) - 1 >= 2 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction ORDER BY SIZE(m.Sequence) DESC, m.Label ASC

question: Return the first 10 nucleotides of miRNA sequences that participate in molecular functions. Return the miRNA label, truncated sequence (i.e., first 10 nts), and associated molecular function label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(mf:Molecular_function) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SUBSTRING(m.Sequence, 0, 10) AS Sequence_First10, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Count all relationships where miRNAs cause or contribute to diseases
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) RETURN COUNT(r) AS RelationshipCount

question: Find the average length of miRNA sequences that cause or contribute to diseases. Return the average sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: Find the difference in length between the longest and shortest miRNA sequences that cause or contribute to diseases.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) RETURN MAX(SIZE(m.Sequence)) - MIN(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS LengthDifference

question: Find all miRNAs that cause or contribute to cancers whose label or description contains the word 'invasive' and whose RNAsister score on the causal relationship is lower than 0.97.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c:Cancer) WHERE (c.Label CONTAINS 'invasive' OR c.Description CONTAINS 'invasive') AND r.RNAsister_score < 0.97 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, r.RNAsister_score AS RNAsister_score

question: Find all infectious diseases whose labels contain 'tuberculosis' and that are caused or contributed to by miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Label CONTAINS 'tuberculosis' RETURN i.Label AS InfectiousDisease

question: List all miRNAs (include label and genomic coordinates in the return clause) that cause or contribute to the infectious disease labeled 'AIDS', excluding miRNAs containing the word 'precursor' in the label and excluding also those located on chromosome X.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(i:Infectious_disease {Label:'AIDS'}) WHERE NOT m.Label CONTAINS 'precursor' AND NONE(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find all autoimmune diseases that are also classified as neurodegenerative diseases and have miRNAs causing or contributing to them.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Autoimmune_disease:Neurodegenerative_disease) RETURN DISTINCT d.Label AS Disease

question: Find all autoimmune diseases whose description contains 'women' and the miRNAs that cause or contribute to them.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(a:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE a.Description CONTAINS 'women' RETURN a.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease, m.Label AS Contributing_miRNAs

question: Find miRNAs with short sequence length (i.e., less than 21 nucleotides) that cause or contribute to autoimmune diseases whose label contains the string 'multiple sclerosis'. Return the miRNA label, sequence, sequence length, and the disease label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(a:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE a.Label CONTAINS 'multiple sclerosis' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) < 21 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, a.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease

question: Find all miRNAs causing or contributing to cardiovascular diseases. Moreover, consider only miRNAs located EXCLUSIVELY on chromosome X (NOT on any other chromosome!).
