question: Identify biological processes that encompass other biological processes, where the first process label contains the word 'phase' and the encompassed process label does not contain the word 'phase'.
cypher: MATCH (bp1:Biological_process)-[:encompasses]->(bp2:Biological_process) WHERE bp1.Label CONTAINS 'phase' AND NOT bp2.Label CONTAINS 'phase' RETURN bp1.Label, bp2.Label

question: Identify cellular components related to the nucleus, either by label or synonym, and the GO terms that are bounding layers of these components.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[:bounding_layer_of]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' OR ANY(s IN cc.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'nucleus') RETURN cc.Label, cc.Synonym, g.Label

question: Identify biological processes that happen in GO term whose description mentions the string 'dna damage'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[r:happens_during]->(cc:Biological_process) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'dna damage' RETURN cc.Label, g.Label, g.Description

question: Identify the GO terms that result in the development or fusion of cellular components whose description contains 'fluid-filled'. Return the component label and description, the GO label and the relationship type.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[r:results_in_development_of|results_in_fusion_of]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Description CONTAINS 'fluid-filled' RETURN cc.Label, cc.Description, g.Label, TYPE(r)

question: Identify GO terms that transport or maintain the localization of other GO terms. Include terms' labels, IDs, and the source of the relationship in the output.
cypher: MATCH (g1:GO)-[r:transports_or_maintains_localization_of]->(g2:GO) RETURN g1.Label, g2.Label, g1.ID, g2.ID, r.Source

question: Identify  GO terms whose label include RNA, excluding rRNA and lrRNA. that result in transport across cellular components.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[:results_in_transport_across]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*RNA.*' AND NOT g.Label =~ '.*(rRNA|lrRNA).*' RETURN g.Label, cc.Label

question: Identify GO terms that are capable of being part of biological processes whose description contains the string 'cell killing'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[:capable_of_part_of]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Description CONTAINS 'cell killing' RETURN g.Label, bp.Label, bp.Description

question: Identify GO terms whose label contains the word 'outer' and the GO terms they are bounding layers of.
cypher: MATCH (g1:GO)-[:bounding_layer_of]->(g2:GO) WHERE g1.Label CONTAINS 'outer' RETURN g1.Label, g2.Label

question: Identify biological processes that are preceded by GO terms. Include the GO term labels, the process labels, and the source of the relationship in the output.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[r:preceded_by]->(g:GO) RETURN g.Label, bp.Label, r.Source

question: Identify phenotypes that are the quality of another phenotype such that at least one of the two phenotype label contains the string 'sub'.
cypher: MATCH (p1:Phenotype)-[:quality_of]->(p2:Phenotype) WHERE p1.Label CONTAINS 'sub' OR p2.Label CONTAINS 'sub' RETURN p1.Label, p2.Label

question: Retrieve the autoimmune diseases that have a basis in the dysfunction of GO terms. Return the entire node for the autoimmune disease and ONLY the label for the GO term.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease)-[r:disease_has_basis_in_dysfunction_of]->(g:GO) RETURN ad, g.Label

question: Identify autoimmune diseases that are realized in response to a stimulus in specific cellular components. Include node label and URI in the output.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease)-[r:realized_in_response_to_stimulus]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN ad.Label, ad.URI, cc.Label, cc.URI

question: Identify mental diseases that are manifestations of mental diseases. Return the labels and descriptions of the involved diseases.
cypher: MATCH (md1:Mental_disease)-[r:manifestation_of]->(md2:Mental_disease) RETURN md1.Label, md1.Description, md2.Label, md2.Description

question: Identify diseases that are realized by the mental disease labeled as 'mental disease course'. Include their labels, descriptions, and URIs in the output.
cypher: MATCH (md:Mental_disease {Label: 'mental disease course'})-[:realizes]->(d:Disease) RETURN d.Label, d.Description, d.URI

question: Identify mental diseases that have an occurrent part corresponding to the disease labeled as 'pathological mental process'. Include the mental disease labels and the LABELS(disease) in the output (to show how the disease is classified).
cypher: MATCH (md:Mental_disease)-[r:has_occurrent_part]->(d:Disease {Label: 'pathological mental process'}) RETURN md.Label, LABELS(d)

question: Identify pairs of mental diseases connected by either 'realizes' or 'has occurrent part' relationship types. Return the relationship type and the source(s) confirming the interaction.
cypher: MATCH (md1:Mental_disease)-[r:realizes|has_occurrent_part]->(md2:Mental_disease) RETURN md1.Label, md2.Label, TYPE(r), r.Source

question: Identify miRNAs that are not involved in the biological process labeled as 'regulation of angiogenesis'. Return miRNA and process label, along with all the properties (PROPERTIES(r)) of the relationship.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:not_involved_in]->(bp:Biological_process {Label:'regulation of angiogenesis'}) RETURN m.Label, bp.Label, PROPERTIES(r)

question: Find the genomic coordinates and sequences of miRNAs that are not involved in biological processes whose label contains the string 'negative regulation'. Return the miRNA sequence and genomic coordinates, along with the process label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:not_involved_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'negative regulation' RETURN m.Sequence, m.Genomic_coordinates, bp.Label

question: Find miRNAs with genomic coordinates on chromosome 19 that are not involved in biological process. Return their sequences, genomic coordinates, and the labels of the processes.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:not_involved_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr19') RETURN m.Sequence, m.Genomic_coordinates, bp.Label

question: Identify biological processes whose description contains 'carbon', with a target start location in the cellular component labeled as 'cytosol'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:has_target_start_location]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label: 'cytosol'}) WHERE bp.Description CONTAINS 'carbon' RETURN bp.Label, bp.Description

question: Identify cancers that predispose towards cancers whose labels contain the word 'leukemia'. Return ONLY the labels of both the predisposing and the predisposed cancers.
cypher: MATCH (c1:Cancer)-[:predisposes_towards]->(c2:Cancer) WHERE c2.Label CONTAINS 'leukemia' RETURN c1.Label, c2.Label

question: Identify cardiovascular diseases that predispose towards the neurodegenerative disease 'Leber hereditary optic neuropathy'., Include both diseases' label and the LABELS(Cardiovascular_disease) to show the full type of the cardiovascular one.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease)-[r:predisposes_towards]->(nd:Neurodegenerative_disease {Label: 'Leber hereditary optic neuropathy'}) RETURN cd.Label, LABELS(cd), nd.Label

question: Find diseases that are realized in other diseases with the same label but different descriptions. Return their labels and descriptions.
cypher: MATCH (d1:Disease)-[:realized_in]->(d2:Disease) WHERE d1.Label = d2.Label AND d1.Description <> d2.Description RETURN d1.Label, d1.Description, d2.Label, d2.Description

question: Which cardiovascular diseases whose label ends with 'cardiomyopathy' have basis in feature of other diseases?
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease)-[r:disease_has_basis_in_feature]->(d:Disease) WHERE cd.Label ENDS WITH 'cardiomyopathy' RETURN cd.Label, d.Label

question: Which cardiovascular diseases have basis in the feature of infectious diseases?
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease)-[:disease_has_basis_in_feature]->(id:Infectious_disease) RETURN cd.Label, id.Label

question: Which diseases share features with cardiovascular diseases? Include both diseases' label and description in the output.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease)-[r:disease_shares_features_of]->(d:Disease) RETURN cd.Label, cd.Description, d.Label, d.Description

question: Which biological processes starting with the letter 'L' have the cellular component labeled 'vacuolar lumen' as their target end location? Include ONLY process label and description, along with the sources confirming the information in the output.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[r:has_target_end_location]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label: 'vacuolar lumen'}) WHERE bp.Label STARTS WITH 'L' RETURN bp.Label, bp.Description, r.Source

question: Which biological processes have the peroxisome as their primary input? Return ONLY their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:has_primary_input]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label: 'peroxisome'}) RETURN bp.Label, bp.URI

question: Which biological processes starting with a label 'negative regulation of DNA' negatively regulate either a biological process or a molecular function? Return the labels of the regulating process and the target, as well as the types of the target node
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:negatively_regulates]->(x) WHERE (x:Biological_process OR x:Molecular_function) AND bp.Label STARTS WITH 'negative regulation of DNA' RETURN bp.Label, x.Label, LABELS(x)

question: Which biological processes containing 'endodeoxyribonuclease' in their label negatively or positively regulate molecular functions? Return the labels of the processes, the target molecular functions, and the type of regulation.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[r:negatively_regulates|positively_regulates]->(mf:Molecular_function) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'endodeoxyribonuclease' RETURN bp.Label, mf.Label, TYPE(r)

question: How many times do biological processes negatively or positively regulate molecular functions?
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[r:negatively_regulates|positively_regulates]->(mf:Molecular_function) RETURN type(r) AS RegulationType, COUNT(*) AS Count

question: Find biological processes that have exactly three sources listed as their causal agent relationships wrt. GO terms. Return the labels of the processes, the GO terms, and the source(s) confirming the interaction.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[r:process_has_causal_agent]->(g:GO) WHERE SIZE(r.Source) = 3 RETURN bp.Label, g.Label, r.Source

question: Find biological processes that encompass other biological processes whose label contains 'checkpoint'. Include the labels of both the encompassing and the encompassed processes in the output.
cypher: MATCH (bp1:Biological_process)-[r:encompasses]->(bp2:Biological_process) WHERE bp2.Label CONTAINS 'checkpoint' RETURN bp1.Label, bp2.Label

question: Find GO terms whose description contains the word 'monoamine' and that form the bounding layer of other GO terms. Return 'monoamine'-like GO term's label, description, along with the labels of the bounded GO terms, and the properties of the bounding relationship (hint: use PROPERTIES(r)).
cypher: MATCH (g1:GO)-[r:bounding_layer_of]->(g2:GO) WHERE g1.Description CONTAINS 'monoamine' RETURN g1.Label, g1.Description, g2.Label, PROPERTIES(r)

question: Find biological processes whose description starts with the word 'progression' and that encompass GO terms. Return the labels of both the processes and the GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[r:encompasses]->(g:GO) WHERE bp.Description STARTS WITH 'progression' RETURN bp.Label, g.Label

question: Which GO terms result in the organization of the GO term labeled as 'cell hair'
cypher: MATCH (g1:GO)-[:results_in_organization_of]->(g2:GO {Label:'cell hair'}) RETURN g1.Label, g2.Label

question: Find GO terms that result in the organization of GO terms, but only when the relationship source includes 'Uberon'. Return the labels of both GO terms and the sources.
cypher: MATCH (g1:GO)-[r:results_in_organization_of]->(g2:GO) WHERE ANY(src IN r.Source WHERE src = 'Uberon') RETURN g1.Label, g2.Label, r.Source

question: Find pairs of miRNAs that genetically interact such that: 1) the first miRNA has at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome 16; 2) the second miRNA has no coordinates on chromosome 16. Retun the labels and genomic coordinates of both miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:genetically_interacts_with]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m1.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr16') AND NONE(coord IN m2.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr16') RETURN m1.Label, m1.Genomic_coordinates, m2.Label, m2.Genomic_coordinates

question: Find miRNAs that are in a homology relationship with pre-miRNAs where the miRNA has at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome X and the pre-miRNA has at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome Y. Return the labels and genomic coordinates of miRNAs and pre-miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:in_homology_relationship_with]->(p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chrX') AND ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chrY') RETURN m.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates, p.Label, p.Genomic_coordinates

question: Find miRNAs that are in a homology relationship with pre-miRNAs where both the miRNA and the pre-miRNA have at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome Y. Return the labels and genomic coordinates of both involved entities.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:in_homology_relationship_with]->(p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chrY') AND ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chrY') RETURN m.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates, p.Label, p.Genomic_coordinates

question: Find miRNAs that act upstream of or within biological processes whose label starts with 'positive regulation'. Return the miRNA labels, biological process labels, the miRNAs' genomic coordinates, and the GO evidence for the relationship.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:acts_upstream_of_or_within]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label STARTS WITH 'positive regulation' RETURN m.Label, bp.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates, r.GO_evidence

question: Find miRNAs that act as causal somatic mutations in cancers where the mutation list contains more than 5 entries. Return the miRNA label, cancer label, miRNA genomic coordinates, and the number of mutations.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:is_causal_somatic_mutation_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE SIZE(r.Mutation) > 5 RETURN m.Label, c.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates, SIZE(r.Mutation)

question: Find miRNAs that act as causal germline mutations in diseases where the 'Interactor' of the relationship is not null. Return the miRNA label, disease label, miRNA genomic coordinates, and the mutations.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:is_causal_germline_mutation_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE r.Interactor IS NOT NULL RETURN m.Label, d.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates, r.Mutation

question: Which miRNAs are located in cellular components that are part of the cellular component whose label contains the word 'mitochondrion'? Return the miRNAs, the cellular components and the parent component labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(parent:Cellular_component) WHERE parent.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondrion' RETURN m.Label, cc.Label, parent.Label

question: Show all pre-miRNA → gene → miRNA triads where the gene label ends with the letter 'BA', linking precursors to mature miRNAs through their genes. Return pre-miRNA, the gene and the miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) WHERE g.Label ENDS WITH 'BA' RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Show all pre-miRNAs transcribed from genes where that also are transcribed to miRNAs, where the gene sequence ends with the triplet 'AAA'. Return the pre-miRNA, the gene and the miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) WHERE g.Sequence ENDS WITH 'AAA' RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which genes that are transcribed into miRNAs regulate the activity of other genes?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) RETURN g.Label, m.Label, t.Label

question: Which diseases whose label contains the word 'respiratory' have phenotypes that express specific miRNAs?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'respiratory' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which cancers whose label contains the word 'renal' over-express miRNAs that are transcribed from genes? What are the overexpression FDR values?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[r:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'renal' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, r.FDR AS FDR

question: In which biological processes whose label includes the string 'Schwann cell' participate  mature miRNAs that develop from precursor miRNAs?
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'Schwann cell' RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Which miRNAs with 'precursor' in their label are associated as causal factors in diseases whose label contains the string 'multiple sclerosis', where the disease has phenotypes with label containing the word 'Aplasia'? Return the miRNA, the disease and the phenotype labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE m.Label CONTAINS 'precursor' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'multiple sclerosis' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'Aplasia' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Which biological processes have as part GO terms that are enabled by miRNAs?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:enables]->(go:GO)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOTerm, bp.Label AS ParentProcess

question: Which miRNAs regulate the activity of genes that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'peripheral nervous system disorder'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease{Label: 'peripheral nervous system disorder'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Which precursor miRNAs are located in cellular components that are part of the GO term labeled as 'nuclear lumen'?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO{Label:'nuclear lumen'}) RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which miRNAs participate in biological processes that have the molecular function labeled as 'JUN kinase activity' as part?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(mf:Molecular_function {Label:'JUN kinase activity'}) RETURN m.Label, bp.Label

question: Which cancers show over-expression of miRNA transcribed from the 'MIR411' genes?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Label: 'MIR411'})-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA

question: In which biological processes including the string 'negative regulation of protein' in their label, the miRNA developed from the precursor 'microRNA hsa-mir-106b precursor' participate?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA {Label: 'microRNA hsa-mir-106b precursor'})-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'negative regulation of protein' RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which GO terms as part of cellular components, is the miRNA 'hsa-miR-23a-5p' located in, and what are the corresponding cellular components?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label: 'hsa-miR-23a-5p'})-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) RETURN go.Label AS GOterm, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which miRNAs regulate the activity of the gene 'CCR2', where that gene contributes to the disease labeled 'AIDS'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label: 'CCR2'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label:'AIDS'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: How many distinct pre-miRNAs develop into miRNAs that are over-expressed in cancers?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS pre_miRNA_count

question: Return pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs overexpressed in cancers, where the pre-miRNA sequence length is less than 50 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE SIZE(p.Sequence) < 50 RETURN DISTINCT p.Label

question: Return the labels of pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs overexpressed in cancers, where the pre-miRNA sequence length is greater than 150 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE SIZE(p.Sequence) > 150 RETURN DISTINCT p.Label

question: For which diseases do expressed miRNAs participate in the biological processe labeled as 'phosphorylation', and how many miRNAs support each disease process pair?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process {Label: 'phosphorylation'}) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, COUNT(m) AS miRNA_count

question: For the cellular component labeled as 'nuclear lumen', identify the GO terms it is part of, and the number of miRNAs located within it.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label: 'nuclear lumen'})-[:part_of]->(g:GO) RETURN g.Label AS GO, cc.Label AS Cellular_component, COUNT(m) AS miRNA_count

question: For each miRNA that is overexpressed in a cancer and the cancer has phenotype features, return the phenotype, the cancer and the number of over-expressed miRNAs involved, ordered according to the number of miRNAs in descending order
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(ph:Phenotype) RETURN ph.Label AS Phenotype, c.Label AS Cancer, COUNT(m) AS overexpressed_miRNAs ORDER BY overexpressed_miRNAs DESC

question: Which GO terms are regulated by the biological processes in which the miRNA 'hsa-miR-199b-3p' participates? return the biological process and the GO labels
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label: 'hsa-miR-199b-3p'})-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:regulates]->(go:GO) RETURN go.Label AS GOTerm, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Identify, for each Gene Ontology term whose label contains 'mediated gene silencing' and each cellular component corresponding to the 'SMAD protein complex', the number of the GO term participant miRNAs that are located in that cellular component, and order the results by the miRNA count.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'mediated gene silencing' AND cc.Label CONTAINS 'SMAD protein complex' RETURN go.Label AS GO, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, COUNT(m) AS miRNAs ORDER BY miRNAs DESC, GO, CellularComponent

question: Identify the precursor miRNAs transcribed from 'MIR103B2' gene and the corresponding mature miRNAs that  transcribe from the gene.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene {Label: 'MIR103B2'})-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) RETURN p.Label AS Precursor_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA

question: Identify the number of distinct diseases that share at least one phenotype with a cancer, considering phenotypes linked to diseases either directly or as disease features.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype|disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)<-[:has_phenotype|disease_has_feature]-(c:Cancer) RETURN count(DISTINCT d)

question: Identify the miRNAs that participate in the biological process labeled as 'microtubule cytoskeleton organization' and list the cellular components or biological processes that are parts of this biological process.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process{Label:'microtubule cytoskeleton organization'})-[:has_part]->(x) WHERE x:Cellular_component OR x:Biological_process RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, x.Label AS PartLabel

question: Which precursor miRNAs interact with miRNAs that regulate the activity of the 'ZEB2' gene?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:interacts_with]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene{Label:'ZEB2'}) RETURN p.Label AS Precursor_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify the phenotypes of the disease labeled 'malignant glioma' in which the miRNA 'hsa-miR-519a-2-5p' miRNA is overexpressed.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-519a-2-5p'})-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease {Label:'malignant glioma'})-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Identify the cancers associated with material basis in somatic mutations in the 'hsa-miR-30d-5p' miRNA and the biological processes in which that miRNA participate
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:has_material_basis_in_somatic_mutation_in]->(m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-30d-5p'})-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Which cancers have a material basis in somatic mutations in miRNAs that participate in the biological process labeled 'cellular response to oxygen levels'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:has_material_basis_in_somatic_mutation_in]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process {Label:'cellular response to oxygen levels'}) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify 'malign'-related diseases, along with their disease categories, the genes that caused or contributed to them, and the precursor miRNAs transcribed from those genes.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d) WHERE (d:Disease OR d:Cancer OR d:Autoimmune_disease OR d:Neurodegenerative_disease OR d:Infectious_disease OR d:Cardiovascular_disease) AND d.Label CONTAINS 'malign' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, labels(d) AS DiseaseLabels, g.Label AS Gene, p.Label AS Precursor

question: Identify diseases and cancers whose labels contain the word 'malign' that share genes causing or contributing to both conditions, where those genes are transcribed into precursor miRNAs, and report the associated disease types, genes, and precursor miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)<-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]-(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_from]-(p:pre_miRNA), (g)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'malign' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, labels(d) AS DiseaseType, p.Label AS Precursor_miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, c.Label AS MalignCancer

question: Identify, for each miRNA expressed in a cancer, the corresponding cancer and its superclass disease.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, d.Label AS SuperDisease

question: Which phenotypes characterize GO terms that are part of the cellular component labeled as 'cytoplasm'?
cypher: MATCH (ph:Phenotype)-[:characteristic_of]->(g:GO)-[:part_of]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label:'cytoplasm'}) RETURN ph.Label AS Phenotype, g.Label AS GOTerm

question: For each disease, how many distinct miRNAs does it express, and how many distinct genes have their activity regulated by those miRNAs
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS ExpressedMiRNAs, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS TargetGenes

question: For each cancer, identify the number of distinct phenotypes that are major feature of the cancer and the number of distinct diseases that share those phenotypes.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_major_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease) RETURN c.Label, COUNT(DISTINCT p), COUNT(DISTINCT d)

question: Identify the genes that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'polyneuropathy' and the miRNAs that regulate their activity.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label: 'polyneuropathy'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Identify the number of pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs located in extracellular exosome-related biological processes or cellular components.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(loc) WHERE (loc:Biological_process OR loc:Cellular_component) AND loc.Label CONTAINS 'extracellular exosome' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS Pre_miRNA_Count

question: For each biological process, count the number of distinct genes that are transcribed to miRNAs participating in that process, and the number of distinct miRNAs involved.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) RETURN bp.Label, COUNT(DISTINCT g), COUNT(DISTINCT m)

question: Which miRNAs enable molecular functions that are part of biological processes or other molecular functions, and what are the corresponding parent terms?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:enables]->(mf:Molecular_function)-[:part_of]->(x) WHERE x:Biological_process OR x:Molecular_function RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, x.Label AS ParentTerm, labels(x) AS ParentTermType

question: Identify miRNAs that are located in cellular components part of the GO term labeled as 'kinetochore'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO {Label: 'kinetochore'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify miRNAs that are located in cellular components that are part of the GO term labeled as 'ocelloid', and report their sequence length, and the corresponding cellular components.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO {Label:'ocelloid'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify miRNAs, along with their sequence lengths and genomic coordinates, that are located in cellular components which are part of the GO term labeled as 'chromosome'
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO {Label: 'chromosome'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Compute the number of distinct precursor miRNAs that are transcribed from genes that are also transcribed into mature miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT pm) AS PrecursorCount

question: Identify, for the cancer labeled as 'Warthin tumor', the phenotypes shared with conditions whose label contains 'anemia type 2', together with their main condition category.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer {Label:'Warthin tumor'})-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(cond) WHERE cond.Label CONTAINS 'anemia type 2' RETURN p.Label, cond.Label, HEAD(labels(cond))

question: Identify miRNAs that are participant of GO terms whose disruption is caused by the disease labeled as 'social phobia'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label: 'social phobia'})-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN go.Label AS GO, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify miRNAs that are transcribed from genes that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'differentiated thyroid carcinoma'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label: 'differentiated thyroid carcinoma'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Identify diseases whose label contains the string 'pregnancy loss' that cause the disruption of biological processes in which miRNAs participate. Return the disease label, the disrupted biological process label, and the participating miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)<-[:participates_in]-(m:miRNA) WHERE (d.Label) CONTAINS ('pregnancy loss') RETURN d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify cancers whose labels contain 'benign' and report the expressed miRNAs along with their cellular component locations.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'benign' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify phenotypes that are characteristic of GO terms which are part of cellular components, and return the phenotype label, GO term label, and cellular component label.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)<-[:has_characteristic]-(g:GO)-[:part_of]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, g.Label AS GOterm, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify cancers whose labels contain 'hereditary' that are connected with the miRNA 'hsa-let-7b-5p' via genes whose activity is regulated by that miRNA and that contribute to these cancers, and return the gene label, and cancer label
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label: 'hsa-let-7b-5p'})-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Cancer) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'hereditary' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify the mature miRNAs developed from the pre-miRNA 'microRNA hsa-mir-31 precursor' and the molecular function or biological process terms in which they participate.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA {Label: 'microRNA hsa-mir-31 precursor'})-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(t) WHERE t:Molecular_function OR t:Biological_process RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, t.Label AS Term

question: Which cancers whose labels contain 'benign' express miRNAs, and in which cellular components are those miRNAs located?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'benign' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify the Gene Ontology terms whose disruption is caused by the disease labeled as 'amnestic disorder' and the miRNAs participant of those terms.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label: 'amnestic disorder'})-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(t:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN t.Label AS DisruptedGOTerm, m.Label AS Participant_miRNA

question: Find the 5 weakest (lowest GeneMANIA weight) genetic interactions between a gene with activity regulated by a miRNA and another gene. Return the miRNA, the regulated gene, the interacting gene, and the GeneMANIA interaction weight.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[r:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, g2.Label, r.GeneMANIA_weight AS GeneMANIA_weight ORDER BY GeneMANIA_weight ASC LIMIT 5

question: Return the 5 records with the lowest FDR where a miRNA is under-expressed in a cancer and regulates the activity of a gene, showing the cancer label, miRNA label, gene label, and FDR, if multiple records have the same FDR, break ties by sorting alphabetically by Gene label.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)<-[r:under_expressed_in]-(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE r.FDR IS NOT NULL RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, r.FDR AS FDR ORDER BY FDR ASC, Gene ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which miRNAs that participate in molecular function or biological process terms with 'transferase' in their labels, are over expressed in the disease labeled as 'B-cell childhood acute lymphoblastic leukemia'? Return miRNA and GO term labels, and the GO term type
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label:'B-cell childhood acute lymphoblastic leukemia'})<-[:over_expressed_in]-(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(t) WHERE t.Label CONTAINS 'transferase' AND (t:Molecular_function OR t:Biological_process) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, t.Label AS GOTerm, labels(t) AS GOTermType

question: In which molecular function or biological process terms does the miRNA participate, if it develops from the pre-miRNA with '612' in the label through maturation? Return the mature miRNA label, GO term label, and GO term type.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(t) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS '612' AND (t:Molecular_function OR t:Biological_process) RETURN m.Label AS Mature_miRNA, t.Label AS Term, labels(t) AS TermType

question: Identify, for the cancer labeled as 'hamartoma', the expressed miRNAs, the cellular components they are related to, and the type of association (e.g., located in, part of, or active in).
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer {Label: 'hamartoma'})-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[r:located_in|part_of|is_active_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, type(r) AS Relation, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which miRNAs regulate the activity of genes that contribute to the disease labeled as 'intellectual disability, X-linked 50'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label: 'intellectual disability, X-linked 50'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Count the distinct precursor miRNAs and mature miRNAs linked through the same gene by transcription, considering only mature miRNAs whose labels do not end with 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Label ENDS WITH 'precursor' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT pm) AS TotalPre_miRNAs, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS TotalMature_miRNAs

question: Which miRNAs are located in GO terms that are part of the cellular component labeled as 'endosome'? Return the miRNA label, GO term label, and cellular component label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(go:GO)-[:part_of]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label:'endosome'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GO_Term, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify the miRNAs that regulate the activity of genes causing or contributing to the disease labeled as  'African iron overload'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label: 'African iron overload'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: list miRNAs located in cellular components that are part of the GO term labeled as 'somatodendritic compartment'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO {Label:'somatodendritic compartment'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Find cancers with material basis somatic mutations in miRNAs that participate in the biological processes whose label contains 'muscle contraction'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:has_material_basis_in_somatic_mutation_in]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'muscle contraction' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: List cardiovascular diseases whose features are phenotypes that are also phenotypes of the disease labeled as 'absence of the pulmonary artery'.
cypher: MATCH (cvd:Cardiovascular_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease {Label: 'absence of the pulmonary artery'}) RETURN cvd.Label AS CardiovascularDisease, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Identify diseases whose label contains the word 'autism' (case-insensitive) that are caused or contributed by miRNAs through genes that have a three-character label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE SIZE(g.Label) = 3 AND toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'autism' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, d.Label AS Disease

question: Which pre-miRNAs and mature miRNAs are connected through transcription via a gene whose label has at least 10 characters?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(g.Label) >= 10 RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs are under-expressed in the disease labeled as 'oral cavity squamous cell carcinoma', and in which cancers are they expressed?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease {Label:'oral cavity squamous cell carcinoma'}) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find miRNAs that have as function molecular functions which are part of biological processes such that the functions OR the processes contain the string 'repressor activity' in their label. Return the label of matching miRNAs, molecular functions, and biological processes.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:has_function]->(mf:Molecular_function)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'repressor activity' OR bp.Label CONTAINS 'repressor activity' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Find miRNAs expressed in cancers that have 'vitamin'-containing phenotypes?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'vitamin' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Identify pre-miRNAs transcribed from genes whose labels end with '-9', and return the corresponding genes and the mature miRNAs transcribed from those genes.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*-9$' RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find miRNAs that regulate genes with 3-character labels and are over-expressed in cancers with 'neoplastic meningitis' in their label, reporting the source of evidence for their over-expression.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene), (m)-[r:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE SIZE(g.Label) = 3 AND toLower(c.Label) CONTAINS 'neoplastic meningitis' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, c.Label AS Cancer, r.Source AS EvidenceSources

question: Identify the top three 'heart'-related diseases ranked by the number of distinct miRNAs that regulate genes contributing to those diseases, and in case of ties, order alphabetically by disease label. Report the corresponding miRNA counts.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'heart' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS Num_miRNAs ORDER BY Num_miRNAs DESC, d.Label LIMIT 3

question: For each cancer whose label contains 'benign', identify the cellular components in which its expressed miRNAs are located, and report the number of miRNAs in each component
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'benign' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, cc.Label AS Cellular_component, COUNT(m) AS miRNA_count

question: Identify miRNAs that participate in GO terms containing 'B cell' in their labels, and the biological processes of which those GO terms are part.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(g:GO)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'B cell' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS GO_term, bp.Label AS Biological_process

question: Which genes have activity regulated by miRNAs expressed in the phenotype labeled as 'Frontotemporal dementia'?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label: 'Frontotemporal dementia'})-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Identify miRNAs whose labels end with '100-5p' that participate in biological processes positively regulating a GO term, and return the miRNA, the biological process, and the positively regulated GO term.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:positively_regulates]->(g:GO) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '100-5p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, g.Label AS PositivelyRegulatedGO

question: Which precursor miRNAs originate from genes with long labels (more than 9 characters), and which mature miRNAs do they produce?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(g.Label) > 9 RETURN pm.Label AS PreMiRNA, g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find cancers that express miRNAs which are under-expressed in the phenotype labeled as 'Neoplasm of the lung', and return the cancer, miRNA, and phenotype labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(p:Phenotype {Label:'Neoplasm of the lung'}) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Which GO terms have as part molecular functions that are enabled by miRNAs?
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:has_part]->(mf:Molecular_function)-[:enabled_by]->(m:miRNA) RETURN go.Label AS GOterm, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, m.Label AS EnablingmiRNA

question: How many distinct precursor miRNAs and mature miRNAs are linked through transcription to the same gene?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS Num_miRNAs, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS Num_Pre_miRNAs

question: Which pre-miRNAs develop into miRNAs that are located in the cellular components labeled as 'ruffle'?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component{Label:'ruffle'})  RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA

question: Find miRNAs expressed in cancers that participate in the biological process labeled as 'apoptotic process'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process {Label:'apoptotic process'}) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs are homologous to pre-miRNAs that are transcribed from genes whose label ends with '0B'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:in_homology_relationship_with]->(pm:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene) WHERE g.Label ENDS WITH '0B' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Identify precursor miRNAs that develop into mature miRNAs participating in the biological process labeled as 'myelination in peripheral nervous system', and report the corresponding precursor and mature miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process {Label: 'myelination in peripheral nervous system'}) RETURN pm.Label AS Precursor, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA

question: Which cancers whose label contains 'brain' share phenotypes with any cancer that has at least one miRNA over-expressed in it?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(:Cancer)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)<-[:has_phenotype]-(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'brain' RETURN DISTINCT c.Label AS Cancer

question: Identify biological processes and the GO terms part of them, which involve miRNAs as participant whose labels contain three consecutive identical digits, and report the corresponding miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(g:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label =~ '.*([0-9])\1\1.*' RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, g.Label AS GOterm, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify the top 3 miRNAs that are overexpressed across the highest number of unique combinations of diseases and their phenotypes, and in case of ties, order them alphabetically.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, COUNT(DISTINCT d.Label + '|' + p.Label) AS DiseasePhenotypePairs ORDER BY DiseasePhenotypePairs DESC, m.Label ASC LIMIT 3

question: Identify all source genes that transcribe miRNAs which regulate the activity of other genes
cypher: MATCH (g1:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g2:Gene) where g1<>g2 RETURN g1.Label AS SourceGene, m.Label AS miRNA, g2.Label AS TargetGene

question: Return the distinct labels of cellular components that include GO terms as part, considering only those GO terms that have miRNAs as parts
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:part_of]->(go:GO)-[:part_of]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN DISTINCT cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify the cellular components in which miRNAs expressed by cancers with 'benign' in their labels are located?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'benign' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Report the ten regulation relationships in which mature miRNAs (and the precursor miRNAs they develop from) regulate the activity of genes using at least five regulation methods, ordered by the number of regulation methods in descending order; in case of ties, order them alphabetically by precursor miRNA, mature miRNA, and target gene. Return the corresponding precursor miRNAs, mature miRNAs, target genes, and regulation methods.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[r:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(r.Method) >= 5 RETURN p.Label AS Precursor, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, r.Method AS Methods ORDER BY SIZE(r.Method) DESC, p.Label ASC, m.Label ASC, g.Label ASC LIMIT 10

question: Which cancers are associated with the over-expression of miRNAs and also express miRNAs? Return the cancer label together with the sources supporting the miRNA over-expression and miRNA expression evidence.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[r1:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[r2:expresses]->(m2:miRNA) RETURN DISTINCT c.Label AS Cancer, r1.Source AS OverExpressionSources, r2.Source AS ExpressionSources

question: Compute the total number of distinct conditions that are caused or contributed by genes whose activity is regulated by miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS TotalConditions

question: Identify genes with labels containing '179', along with their associated precursor and mature miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS '179' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, p.Label AS Precursor_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA

question: Identify neurodegenerative diseases and the miRNAs they express that participate in biological processes whose label contains the word 'growth'.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'growth' RETURN nd.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease, m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Find GO terms whose label contains the word 'stimulus' that have as participants miRNAs that regulate the activity of the gene 'PUM1'.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label: 'PUM1'}) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'stimulus' RETURN go.Label AS GOTerm, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify, for each cardiovascular disease, the disrupted GO terms and the participating miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN cd.Label AS CardiovascularDisease, go.Label AS GO, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs are located in cellular components that are part of GO terms whose label contains the word 'vesicle'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'vesicle' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GO

question: Identify genes, the pre-miRNAs they transcribed to, and the mature miRNAs they develop into whose label ends with '44-5p'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '44-5p' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, p.Label AS PreMiRNA, m.Label AS MatureMiRNA

question: Identify pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs expressed in cancers.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) RETURN p.Label AS PreMiRNA, m.Label AS MatureMiRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Which biological processes have GO terms as parts that positively regulate molecular functions?
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(g:GO)-[:positively_regulates]->(mf:Molecular_function) RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, g.Label AS GOTerm, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: For each cancer whose label contains 'breast', how many distinct miRNAs are over-expressed in diseases that are subclasses of that cancer?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'breast' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: Identify genes whose labels start with 'EEF' and report, for each gene, the number of distinct miRNAs (developed from pre-miRNAs) that regulate its activity.
cypher: MATCH (:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'EEF' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS regulatingMiRNAs

question: Identify cellular components where miRNAs expressed by cancers are located, and for each component count the number of distinct cancers and distinct miRNAs associated with it
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS cancers, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNAs

question: Find pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs over-expressed in the cancer labeled as 'meningioma' and whose sequence ends with 'GACA'. Return the pre-miRNA and miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer {Label:'meningioma'}) WHERE pre.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GACA' RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify human miRNAs that regulate the activity of genes which cause or contribute to cancers whose description contains the word 'malignant', and return the label of: the miRNA, the gene, and the cancer together with the cancer description
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species:'Homo sapiens'})-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'malignant' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene,c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS CancerDescription

question: Identify cancers whose description contains the word 'benign' that cause disruption of GO terms, along with the disrupted GO term labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(go:GO) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'benign' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS CancerDescription, go.Label AS GO_Term

question: Identify cancers whose label contains the string 'breast carcinoma' expressing miRNAs that participate in GO terms whose label ends with 'process'. Return the label of the: cancer, miRNA, and GO term.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'breast carcinoma' AND go.Label ENDS WITH 'process' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GO_Term

question: Identify miRNAs whose label starts with 'hsa' that regulate the gene 'FSTL1' and contribute to cardiovascular diseases. Return the miRNA and disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label:'FSTL1'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(cv:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cv.Label AS Disease

question: Identify cancers associated with the under-expression of miRNAs and expressing miRNAs with genomic coordinates mapped to chromosome 9. Return ONLY the cancers label.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m2.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr9') RETURN c.Label AS Cancer

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose phenotypic features express human miRNAs. Return the disease, feature, and miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (cv:Cardiovascular_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA{Species:'Homo sapiens'}) RETURN cv.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find miRNAs under-expressed in cancers with FDR greater than 0.0095 that have recorded phenotypic features. Return the label of the: miRNA, cancer, and phenotype, along with the FDR value.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE r.FDR > 0.0095 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, p.Label AS Phenotype, r.FDR AS FDR

question: Which infectious diseases whose label contains the word 'adult' are characterized by the over-expression of pre-miRNAs or express miRNAs? Return only the disease labels
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease)<-[:over_expressed_in]-(pre:pre_miRNA) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'adult' RETURN d.Label AS AdultInfectiousDisease UNION MATCH (d:Infectious_disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'adult' RETURN d.Label AS AdultInfectiousDisease

question: Find cancers that express miRNAs participating in GO terms whose label contains the word 'cytokine'. Return the label of: the cancer, the miRNA, and the GO term labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'cytokine' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOTerm

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that are over-expressed in diseases with an FDR greater than 0.008, and what is the corresponding FDR value? Return the cancer labels and the corresponding FDR value
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(:miRNA)-[r:over_expressed_in]->(:Disease) WHERE r.FDR > 0.008 RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, r.FDR AS FDR

question: Count the number of pairs involving different molecular functions that co-occur as part of the same biological process.
cypher: MATCH (mf1:Molecular_function)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process)<-[:part_of]-(mf2:Molecular_function) WHERE mf1 <> mf2 RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT [bp, mf1, mf2]) AS PairCount

question: List diseases that are related with germline causal mutations in miRNAs, showing the involved miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)<-[:is_causal_germline_mutation_in]-(m:miRNA) RETURN DISTINCT d.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA

question: List diseases connected to miRNAs through relationships whose type includes both the words 'germline' and 'causal'. Return the relationship type, the disease label, and the involved miRNAs label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r]->(d:Disease) WHERE TYPE(r) CONTAINS 'causal' AND TYPE(r) CONTAINS 'germline' RETURN type(r) AS RelationType, d.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which genes with numeric suffixes in their label produce miRNAs that regulate the activity of genes with alphabetic suffixes in their label?
cypher: MATCH (g1:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g2:Gene) WHERE g1.Label =~ '.*[0-9]$' AND g2.Label =~ '.*[A-Za-z]$' RETURN g1.Label AS SourceGene, m.Label AS miRNA, g2.Label AS TargetGene

question: List miRNAs that are expressed by diseases, have no annotated functions, and whose labels end with 'a-3p'. Return both the miRNA labels and their sequences.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) WHERE NOT (m)-[:function_of]->(:GO) AND m.Label ENDS WITH 'a-3p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs over-expressed in the cancer labeled as 'meningioma' and whose sequence ends with 'GACA'. Return the pre-miRNA label and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer{Label:'meningioma'}) WHERE pre.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GACA' RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find genes that transcribe miRNAs which are over-expressed in neurodegenerative diseases. Return the label of: gene, miRNA, and disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(nd:Neurodegenerative_disease) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA, nd.Label AS Neurodegenerative_Disease

question: Identify human miRNAs that regulate genes which cause or contribute to cancers whose description contains the string 'malignant myomatous'. Return the miRNA label, gene label, and cancer label and description.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA{Species:'Homo sapiens'})-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'malignant myomatous' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, c.Description AS CancerDescription, c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find cancers whose label contains the string 'breast carcinoma' expressing miRNAs that participate in GO terms whose labels end with 'process'. Return the label of: cancer, miRNA, and GO term.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'breast carcinoma' AND go.Label ENDS WITH 'process' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GO_Term

question: Identify miRNAs with sequences of at least 21 nucleotides that are overexpressed in cardiovascular diseases, together with the corresponding disease phenotypes.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(cv:Cardiovascular_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 21 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cv.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Find miRNAs that regulate the activity of the gene 'FSTL1' which cause or contribute to cardiovascular diseases. Return the miRNA and disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label:'FSTL1'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(cv:Cardiovascular_disease) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cv.Label AS Disease

question: For each cancer, count the number of cases where a miRNA is under-expressed and the same cancer expresses a miRNA located on chromosome 9.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m2.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr9') RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, COUNT(*) AS Count_matches

question: Find neurodegenerative diseases that have phenotypic features expressing miRNAs. Return the disease, phenotype, and miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) RETURN nd.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose phenotypic features express human miRNAs. Return the disease, the phenotype feature, and miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (cv:Cardiovascular_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA {Species:'Homo sapiens'}) RETURN cv.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find miRNAs under-expressed in cancers with FDR greater than 0.0095 that have phenotypic features. Return the miRNA label, cancer label, phenotype label, and the FDR value.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE r.FDR > 0.0095 Return m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, p.Label AS Phenotype, r.FDR AS FDR

question: Identify cancers expressing miRNAs which participate in GO terms whose label includes the string 'transition of mitotic cell cycle'. Return the cancer, miRNA, and GO term labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'transition of mitotic cell cycle' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GO_Term

question: Find phenotypes that express miRNAs under-expressed in cancers whose label contains the word 'esophagus' with an FDR value lower than 0.05. Return the label of: phenotype, miRNA, and cancer, along with the FDR value.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE r.FDR < 0.05 AND c.Label CONTAINS 'esophagus' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, r.FDR AS FDR

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that are over-expressed in diseases with an FDR value greater than 0.008 confirming the over-expression?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[r:over_expressed_in]->(:Disease) WHERE r.FDR > 0.008 RETURN  c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, r.FDR AS FDR

question: Find all distinct pairs of molecular functions such that one starts and the other ends the same biological process. Return the biological process label along with the two molecular function labels.
cypher: MATCH (mf1:Molecular_function)-[:starts]->(bp:Biological_process)<-[:ends]-(mf2:Molecular_function) WHERE mf1 <> mf2 RETURN DISTINCT bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, mf1.Label AS MolecularFunction1, mf2.Label AS MolecularFunction2

question: Identify autoimmune diseases caused by disruption of GO terms that have miRNA participants, and return the disease, the GO term, and the number of distinct miRNAs involved.
cypher: MATCH (a:Autoimmune_disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(g:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN a.Label AS Disease, g.Label AS GOterm, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNAParticipants

question: Which diseases whose label contains the word 'allergic' have phenotype features which are phenotype of cardiovascular diseases. Return the disease, phenotype, and cardiovascular disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(cv:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'allergic' RETURN d.Label AS disease, p.Label AS phenotype, cv.Label AS cardiovascular_disease

question: Identify cancers that have long-labeled phenotypes (label length > 50 characters), where these phenotypes are shared with other diseases. Return the label of the: cancer, the phenotype, and the related disease.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d2:Disease) WHERE SIZE(p.Label) > 50 AND d2 <> c RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, p.Label AS Phenotype, d2.Label AS RelatedDisease

question: Identify neurodegenerative diseases whose label contains the word 'herpes' along with their phenotypes, where these phenotypes are also phenotype of diseases whose label contains the word 'palsy'.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d2:Disease) WHERE nd.Label CONTAINS 'herpes' AND d2.Label CONTAINS 'palsy' RETURN nd.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease, p.Label AS Phenotype, d2.Label AS Disease

question: Identify all miRNAs that regulate the activity of gene 'YY1' and the cancers whose label contains the word 'situ' that this gene causes or contributes to. Return the label of the miRNA and the cancer.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label:'YY1'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c:Cancer) WHERE toLower(c.Label) CONTAINS 'situ' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Return miRNAs whose labels end with '31-5p' that are over-expressed in diseases which are subclasses of cancers with label containing 'malignant', and include the miRNA and cancer labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' AND m.Label ENDS WITH '31-5p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Return cancers, the miRNAs they express, and the cellular components containing the string 'kinase complex' in their labels where the miRNAs are located.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'kinase complex' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which miRNAs enable molecular functions whose label contains the string 'amino acid', that are part of biological processes?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:enables]->(mf:Molecular_function)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'amino acid' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Identify miRNAs expressed in cancers that have genomic coordinates on chromosome 11 and participate in biological processes whose label contains the string 'cell cycle phase transition'. Return the label of the: cancer, miRNA, and biological process.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr11') AND bp.Label CONTAINS 'cell cycle phase transition' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Identify cancers containing the word 'hepato' in their label and that have material somatic mutation in miRNAs whose label ends with '122-5p', and specify the cellular components where these miRNAs are located. Return the label of the: cancer, miRNA, and cellular component.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:has_material_basis_in_somatic_mutation_in]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'hepato' AND m.Label ENDS WITH '122-5p' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify diseases connected to genes through miRNAs transcribed from those genes, where the miRNAs are reported as causal germline mutations in the diseases, and return the label of the: gene, miRNA, and disease.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:is_causal_germline_mutation_in]->(d:Disease) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify cancers whose label contains the word 'childhood' that over-express miRNAs connected to pre-miRNAs through interaction relashionship, and return the pre-miRNA, the miRNA, and the cancer labels.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:interacts_with]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'childhood' RETURN p.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Identify biological processes whose label contains the string 'regulation of cell' and involve miRNAs with genomic coordinates on chromosome 21, along with the corresponding mature and precursor miRNAs that participate in each process.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr21') and bp.Label contains 'regulation of cell' RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA, pre.Label AS pre_miRNA

question: Which cancers are realized in biological processes that involve miRNA participants? Return the label of cancer and the number of miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:realized_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNAsViaProcesses

question: Identify miRNAs located in cellular components capable of some molecular functions, and report the number of miRNAs associated with each molecular function.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:capable_of]->(mf:Molecular_function) RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: Which miRNAs, whose labels end with a number and with genomic coordinates located on chromosome 1 (chr1:), participate in biological processes that are part of GO terms? Return the miRNA, biological processes, and GO terms labels
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) WHERE m.Label =~ '.*\d$' AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, go.Label AS GO

question: Which pre-miRNAs and mature miRNAs are connected by transcription through the same gene whose label contains at least six digits?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) WHERE g.Label =~ '(?:.*\d){6,}.*' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs regulate the activity of the gene 'BAP1' that cause or contribute to diseases whose label contains the word 'susceptibility'? Return the miRNA and the disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label: 'BAP1'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'susceptibility' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease

question: Retrieve pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs located in the cellular component labeled as 'postsynapse'. Return the pre-miRNA and the mature miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label:'postsynapse'}) RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA

question: Find GO terms that are part of cellular components that have as part the miRNA 'microRNA hsa-mir-7704 precursor'. Return the GO term and the cellular component labels.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:part_of]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:has_part]->(m:miRNA{Label:'microRNA hsa-mir-7704 precursor'}) RETURN go.Label AS GO_Term, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify miRNAs that are expressed in diseases subclasses of cancers whose label contains the word 'benign', along with the diseases and the parent cancer labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:expressed_in]->(d1:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(d2:Cancer) WHERE d2.Label CONTAINS 'benign' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d1.Label AS Disease, d2.Label AS ParentCancer

question: Identify the miRNAs located in cellular components that are part of the GO terms labeled as 'mitochondrial envelope'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(g:GO {Label:'mitochondrial envelope'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: How many phenotypes have the diseases causally influenced by the miRNA 'hsa-miR-660-3p'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA{Label:'hsa-miR-660-3p'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS PhenotypeCount

question: Consider the miRNA 'hsa-miR-4429'. How many distinct phenotypes are associated with the diseases it causes or contributes to?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-4429'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS PhenotypeCount

question: Which cancers whose label contains the word 'benign' express miRNAs that are under-expressed in cancers whose label contains the word 'malignant'?
cypher: MATCH (c1:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c2:Cancer) WHERE c1.Label CONTAINS 'benign' AND c2.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' RETURN c1.Label AS BenignCancer, m.Label AS miRNA, c2.Label AS MalignantCancer

question: Identify pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs located in the cellular components whose label is 'ruffle' or 'cell leading edge'?
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label IN ['ruffle', 'cell leading edge'] RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which genes are regulated by miRNAs and contribute to the disease labeled as 'GLUT1 deficiency syndrome'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label:'GLUT1 deficiency syndrome'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Which pre-miRNAs are transcribed from the gene 'MIR603' and what miRNAs do they give rise to (via transcription)?
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene {Label: 'MIR603'})-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA

question: List miRNAs that regulate the activity of genes causing or contributing to the disease labeled as 'aneuploidy'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label:'aneuploidy'})<-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]-(g:Gene)<-[:regulates_activity_of]-(m:miRNA) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Consider miRNAs whose label contains the string '133a-5p'. List the GO terms they are located in and the corresponding cellular components the GO terms have as a part.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(g:GO)-[:has_part]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE m.Label CONTAINS '133a-5p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS ParentGO, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List miRNAs that participate in GO terms and the cellular components in which they are active, return the miRNA and the cellular component labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA)-[:is_active_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify cancers that express miRNAs, and the cellular components the miRNAs are part of.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:part_of]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN DISTINCT c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify neurodegenerative diseases that express miRNAs, and the cellular components these miRNAs are part of.
cypher: MATCH (d:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:part_of]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN DISTINCT d.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify miRNAs that are transcribed from genes and regulate the activity of specific target genes and return the miRNA, the target gene, the sequence lengths of both the target gene and the source gene.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, t.Label AS TargetGene, SIZE(t.Sequence) AS TargetGeneLength, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS GeneLength

question: Find miRNAs carrying material basis somatic mutations in cancers labeled as 'esophageal', and the cellular components where these miRNAs are located.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:has_material_basis_in_somatic_mutation_in]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'esophageal' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List cancers that are superclasses of diseases having as phenotype the one labeled as 'Severe short stature', excluding diseases whose label contains the string 'oma'. Return the disease and the cancer labels.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Severe short stature'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer) WHERE NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'oma' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Identify molecular functions where the biological processes whose label contains the string 'sodium ion' have these molecular functions as parts and in which miRNAs participate
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(mf:Molecular_function) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'sodium ion' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: List pre-miRNAs located in the GO term labeled as 'Cajal body' and the cellular components this GO term is part of.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:located_in]->(go:GO {Label:'Cajal body'})<-[:part_of]-(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that regulate the activity of the gene 'SYNCRIP'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label:'SYNCRIP'}) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify the precursor miRNAs that develop into the miRNA 'hsa-miR-31-5p' and the cellular components in which this miRNA is located.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA {Label: 'hsa-miR-31-5p'})-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Identify pre-miRNAs that develop into mature miRNAs located in the cellular component labeled as 'cell leading edge'.
